```
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using TMPro;
using Newtonsoft.Json;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;
using Assets.Scripts;

namespace StationpediaAscended.UI.StationPlanner
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Station Planner - A note-taking text editor window for Stationeers
    /// Rebuilt from first principles with simple, functional UI
    /// </summary>
    public class StationPlannerWindow : MonoBehaviour
    {
        #region Singleton & State
        
        public static StationPlannerWindow Instance { get; private set; }
        public static bool IsOpen => Instance != null && Instance._windowCanvas != null && Instance._windowCanvas.enabled;
        
        private Canvas _windowCanvas;
        private GameObject _windowPanel;
        private RectTransform _windowRect;
        
        #endregion
        
        #region UI References
        
        private TMP_InputField _editorInputField;
        private ScrollRect _fileTreeScrollRect;
        private RectTransform _fileTreeContent;
        private TextMeshProUGUI _currentFileLabel;
        
        // Resize handles
        private bool _isResizing = false;
        private Vector2 _resizeStartPos;
        private Vector2 _resizeStartSize;
        
        #endregion
        
        #region Data
        
        private PlannerFileSystem _fileSystem;
        private PlannerFile _currentFile;
        private string _savePath;
        private bool _hasUnsavedChanges = false;
        
        #endregion
        
        #region Constants
        
        private const float MIN_WIDTH = 500f;
        private const float MIN_HEIGHT = 350f;
        private const float DEFAULT_WIDTH = 700f;
        private const float DEFAULT_HEIGHT = 480f;
        private const float TITLE_BAR_HEIGHT = 28f;
        private const float TOOLBAR_HEIGHT = 32f;
        private const float FILE_TREE_WIDTH = 180f;
        
        // Stationeers game colors (from the UI)
        private static readonly Color BG_DARK = new Color(0.067f, 0.106f, 0.145f, 0.97f);      // Dark blue background
        private static readonly Color BG_PANEL = new Color(0.082f, 0.125f, 0.169f, 0.95f);     // Slightly lighter panel
        private static readonly Color BG_INPUT = new Color(0.047f, 0.078f, 0.114f, 1f);        // Input field background
        private static readonly Color ACCENT = new Color(1f, 0.478f, 0.094f, 1f);              // Orange #FF7A18
        private static readonly Color TEXT_NORMAL = new Color(0.85f, 0.85f, 0.85f, 1f);        // Light gray text
        private static readonly Color TEXT_DIM = new Color(0.5f, 0.5f, 0.5f, 1f);              // Dimmed text
        private static readonly Color BORDER = new Color(0.3f, 0.4f, 0.5f, 0.6f);              // Subtle border
        private static readonly Color BTN_NORMAL = new Color(0.12f, 0.18f, 0.24f, 1f);         // Button normal
        private static readonly Color BTN_HOVER = new Color(0.16f, 0.24f, 0.32f, 1f);          // Button hover
        private static readonly Color BTN_PRESS = new Color(0.2f, 0.3f, 0.4f, 1f);             // Button pressed
        private static readonly Color SELECTED = new Color(1f, 0.478f, 0.094f, 0.25f);         // Selection highlight
        
        #endregion
        
        #region Initialization
        
        public static void Initialize()
        {
            if (Instance != null) return;
            
            var go = new GameObject("StationPlannerWindow");
            Instance = go.AddComponent<StationPlannerWindow>();
            DontDestroyOnLoad(go);
            
            Instance.CreateWindow();
            Instance.LoadFileSystem();
            Instance.Hide();
        }
        
        public static void Cleanup()
        {
            if (Instance != null)
            {
                Instance.SaveCurrentFile();
                Instance.SaveFileSystem();
                
                if (Instance._windowPanel != null)
                    Destroy(Instance._windowPanel);
                if (Instance._windowCanvas != null)
                    Destroy(Instance._windowCanvas.gameObject);
                    
                Destroy(Instance.gameObject);
                Instance = null;
            }
        }
        
        void OnDestroy()
        {
            SaveCurrentFile();
            SaveFileSystem();
        }
        
        #endregion
        
        #region Window Creation
        
        private void CreateWindow()
        {
            // Create canvas
            var canvasGO = new GameObject("StationPlannerCanvas");
            canvasGO.transform.SetParent(transform);
            
            _windowCanvas = canvasGO.AddComponent<Canvas>();
            _windowCanvas.renderMode = RenderMode.ScreenSpaceOverlay;
            _windowCanvas.sortingOrder = 900;
            
            var scaler = canvasGO.AddComponent<CanvasScaler>();
            scaler.uiScaleMode = CanvasScaler.ScaleMode.ScaleWithScreenSize;
            scaler.referenceResolution = new Vector2(1920, 1080);
            
            canvasGO.AddComponent<GraphicRaycaster>();
            
            // Main window panel
            _windowPanel = CreatePanel(canvasGO.transform, "Window", DEFAULT_WIDTH, DEFAULT_HEIGHT);
            _windowRect = _windowPanel.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            _windowRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f);
            _windowRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f);
            _windowRect.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f);
            _windowRect.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
            
            var windowBg = _windowPanel.AddComponent<Image>();
            windowBg.color = BG_DARK;
            
            // Border outline
            var outline = _windowPanel.AddComponent<Outline>();
            outline.effectColor = ACCENT;
            outline.effectDistance = new Vector2(1, 1);
            
            // Create UI sections
            CreateTitleBar(_windowPanel.transform);
            CreateToolbar(_windowPanel.transform);
            CreateFileTreePanel(_windowPanel.transform);
            CreateEditorPanel(_windowPanel.transform);
            CreateResizeHandle(_windowPanel.transform);
        }
        
        private GameObject CreatePanel(Transform parent, string name, float width, float height)
        {
            var panel = new GameObject(name);
            panel.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
            var rect = panel.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(width, height);
            return panel;
        }
        
        private void CreateTitleBar(Transform parent)
        {
            var titleBar = CreatePanel(parent, "TitleBar", 0, TITLE_BAR_HEIGHT);
            var rect = titleBar.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            rect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            rect.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);
            rect.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, TITLE_BAR_HEIGHT);
            
            var bg = titleBar.AddComponent<Image>();
            bg.color = BG_PANEL;
            
            // Make draggable
            var drag = titleBar.AddComponent<WindowDragHandler>();
            drag.WindowRect = _windowRect;
            
            // Title text
            var titleGO = new GameObject("Title");
            titleGO.transform.SetParent(titleBar.transform, false);
            var titleText = titleGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            titleText.text = "<color=#FF7A18>*</color> Station Planner";
            titleText.fontSize = 15;
            titleText.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
            titleText.color = TEXT_NORMAL;
            titleText.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.MidlineLeft;
            
            var titleRect = titleGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            titleRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            titleRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            titleRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(10, 0);
            titleRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-35, 0);
            
            // Close button
            var closeBtn = CreateTextButton(titleBar.transform, "X", 24, 24);
            var closeBtnRect = closeBtn.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            closeBtnRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(1, 0.5f);
            closeBtnRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 0.5f);
            closeBtnRect.pivot = new Vector2(1, 0.5f);
            closeBtnRect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-4, 0);
            closeBtn.GetComponent<Button>().onClick.AddListener(Hide);
            
            // Make close button red-ish
            var closeBtnImg = closeBtn.GetComponent<Image>();
            closeBtnImg.color = new Color(0.4f, 0.15f, 0.15f, 1f);
        }
        
        private void CreateToolbar(Transform parent)
        {
            var toolbar = CreatePanel(parent, "Toolbar", 0, TOOLBAR_HEIGHT);
            var rect = toolbar.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            rect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            rect.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);
            rect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(0, -TITLE_BAR_HEIGHT);
            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, TOOLBAR_HEIGHT);
            
            var bg = toolbar.AddComponent<Image>();
            bg.color = new Color(BG_PANEL.r, BG_PANEL.g, BG_PANEL.b, 0.7f);
            
            var hlg = toolbar.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
            hlg.spacing = 4;
            hlg.padding = new RectOffset(6, 6, 3, 3);
            hlg.childAlignment = TextAnchor.MiddleLeft;
            hlg.childControlWidth = false;
            hlg.childControlHeight = true;
            hlg.childForceExpandWidth = false;
            
            // File buttons - simple text, no unicode
            var newFileBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(toolbar.transform, "New", 45);
            newFileBtn.onClick.AddListener(OnNewFile);
            AddSimpleTooltip(newFileBtn.gameObject, "Create new file");
            
            var newFolderBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(toolbar.transform, "Folder", 55);
            newFolderBtn.onClick.AddListener(OnNewFolder);
            AddSimpleTooltip(newFolderBtn.gameObject, "Create new folder");
            
            var renameBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(toolbar.transform, "Rename", 60);
            renameBtn.onClick.AddListener(OnRename);
            AddSimpleTooltip(renameBtn.gameObject, "Rename selected");
            
            var deleteBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(toolbar.transform, "Delete", 55);
            deleteBtn.onClick.AddListener(OnDelete);
            AddSimpleTooltip(deleteBtn.gameObject, "Delete selected");
            
            var saveBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(toolbar.transform, "Save", 45);
            saveBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => { SaveCurrentFile(); SaveFileSystem(); });
            AddSimpleTooltip(saveBtn.gameObject, "Save (Ctrl+S)");
            
            // Separator
            CreateSeparator(toolbar.transform);
            
            // Formatting buttons
            var boldBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(toolbar.transform, "B", 26);
            boldBtn.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>().fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
            boldBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => InsertTag("<b>", "</b>"));
            AddSimpleTooltip(boldBtn.gameObject, "Bold");
            
            var italicBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(toolbar.transform, "I", 26);
            italicBtn.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>().fontStyle = FontStyles.Italic;
            italicBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => InsertTag("<i>", "</i>"));
            AddSimpleTooltip(italicBtn.gameObject, "Italic");
            
            var headerBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(toolbar.transform, "H", 26);
            headerBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => InsertTag("<size=120%><b>", "</b></size>"));
            AddSimpleTooltip(headerBtn.gameObject, "Header");
            
            var colorBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(toolbar.transform, "C", 26);
            colorBtn.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>().color = ACCENT;
            colorBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => InsertTag("<color=#FF7A18>", "</color>"));
            AddSimpleTooltip(colorBtn.gameObject, "Orange color");
            
            var bulletBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(toolbar.transform, "-", 26);
            bulletBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => InsertText("\n- "));
            AddSimpleTooltip(bulletBtn.gameObject, "Bullet point");
        }
        
        private void CreateFileTreePanel(Transform parent)
        {
            var panel = CreatePanel(parent, "FileTree", FILE_TREE_WIDTH, 0);
            var rect = panel.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 0);
            rect.anchorMax = new Vector2(0, 1);
            rect.pivot = new Vector2(0, 1);
            rect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(5, -(TITLE_BAR_HEIGHT + TOOLBAR_HEIGHT + 5));
            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(FILE_TREE_WIDTH, -(TITLE_BAR_HEIGHT + TOOLBAR_HEIGHT + 10));
            
            var bg = panel.AddComponent<Image>();
            bg.color = BG_PANEL;
            
            // Scroll view
            _fileTreeScrollRect = panel.AddComponent<ScrollRect>();
            _fileTreeScrollRect.horizontal = false;
            _fileTreeScrollRect.vertical = true;
            _fileTreeScrollRect.movementType = ScrollRect.MovementType.Clamped;
            _fileTreeScrollRect.scrollSensitivity = 25f;
            
            // Viewport
            var viewport = CreatePanel(panel.transform, "Viewport", 0, 0);
            var vpRect = viewport.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            vpRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            vpRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            vpRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(2, 2);
            vpRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-2, -2);
            
            viewport.AddComponent<Image>().color = Color.clear;
            viewport.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Mask>().showMaskGraphic = false;
            _fileTreeScrollRect.viewport = vpRect;
            
            // Content
            var content = CreatePanel(viewport.transform, "Content", 0, 0);
            _fileTreeContent = content.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            _fileTreeContent.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            _fileTreeContent.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            _fileTreeContent.pivot = new Vector2(0, 1);
            _fileTreeContent.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
            
            var vlg = content.AddComponent<VerticalLayoutGroup>();
            vlg.spacing = 1;
            vlg.padding = new RectOffset(3, 3, 3, 3);
            vlg.childControlWidth = true;
            vlg.childControlHeight = false;
            vlg.childForceExpandWidth = true;
            vlg.childForceExpandHeight = false;
            
            var csf = content.AddComponent<ContentSizeFitter>();
            csf.verticalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
            
            _fileTreeScrollRect.content = _fileTreeContent;
        }
        
        private void CreateEditorPanel(Transform parent)
        {
            var panel = CreatePanel(parent, "Editor", 0, 0);
            var rect = panel.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 0);
            rect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            rect.offsetMin = new Vector2(FILE_TREE_WIDTH + 10, 5);
            rect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-5, -(TITLE_BAR_HEIGHT + TOOLBAR_HEIGHT + 5));
            
            var bg = panel.AddComponent<Image>();
            bg.color = BG_INPUT;
            
            // Current file label
            var labelGO = new GameObject("FileLabel");
            labelGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            _currentFileLabel = labelGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            _currentFileLabel.text = "No file selected";
            _currentFileLabel.fontSize = 11;
            _currentFileLabel.color = TEXT_DIM;
            _currentFileLabel.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopRight;
            
            var labelRect = labelGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            labelRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            labelRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            labelRect.pivot = new Vector2(1, 1);
            labelRect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-5, -2);
            labelRect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 16);
            
            // Input field setup
            var inputGO = new GameObject("Input");
            inputGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            var inputRect = inputGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            inputRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            inputRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            inputRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(6, 6);
            inputRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-6, -20);
            
            // Text area
            var textAreaGO = new GameObject("TextArea");
            textAreaGO.transform.SetParent(inputGO.transform, false);
            var textAreaRect = textAreaGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            textAreaRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textAreaRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textAreaRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            textAreaRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Text component
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(textAreaGO.transform, false);
            var textComp = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            textComp.fontSize = 14;
            textComp.color = TEXT_NORMAL;
            textComp.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopLeft;
            textComp.enableWordWrapping = true;
            textComp.richText = true;
            textComp.overflowMode = TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
            
            var textRect = textGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Placeholder
            var placeholderGO = new GameObject("Placeholder");
            placeholderGO.transform.SetParent(textAreaGO.transform, false);
            var placeholder = placeholderGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            placeholder.text = "Type your notes here...";
            placeholder.fontSize = 14;
            placeholder.color = TEXT_DIM;
            placeholder.fontStyle = FontStyles.Italic;
            placeholder.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopLeft;
            
            var phRect = placeholderGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            phRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            phRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            phRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            phRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Create input field
            _editorInputField = inputGO.AddComponent<TMP_InputField>();
            _editorInputField.textComponent = textComp;
            _editorInputField.placeholder = placeholder;
            _editorInputField.textViewport = textAreaRect;
            _editorInputField.lineType = TMP_InputField.LineType.MultiLineNewline;
            _editorInputField.richText = true;
            _editorInputField.characterLimit = 0;
            _editorInputField.caretColor = ACCENT;
            _editorInputField.selectionColor = SELECTED;
            _editorInputField.caretWidth = 2;
            _editorInputField.onValueChanged.AddListener((_) => _hasUnsavedChanges = true);
        }
        
        private void CreateResizeHandle(Transform parent)
        {
            var handle = CreatePanel(parent, "ResizeHandle", 20, 20);
            var rect = handle.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.anchorMin = new Vector2(1, 0);
            rect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 0);
            rect.pivot = new Vector2(1, 0);
            rect.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
            
            var img = handle.AddComponent<Image>();
            img.color = new Color(ACCENT.r, ACCENT.g, ACCENT.b, 0.4f);
            
            // Resize indicator text
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(handle.transform, false);
            var text = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            text.text = "//";
            text.fontSize = 12;
            text.color = TEXT_DIM;
            text.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
            var textRect = textGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            var resizer = handle.AddComponent<WindowResizeHandler>();
            resizer.WindowRect = _windowRect;
            resizer.MinSize = new Vector2(MIN_WIDTH, MIN_HEIGHT);
        }
        
        #endregion
        
        #region UI Helpers
        
        private Button CreateToolbarBtn(Transform parent, string label, float width)
        {
            var go = new GameObject(label);
            go.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
            
            var le = go.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            le.preferredWidth = width;
            le.preferredHeight = 24;
            
            var img = go.AddComponent<Image>();
            img.color = BTN_NORMAL;
            
            var btn = go.AddComponent<Button>();
            btn.targetGraphic = img;
            var colors = btn.colors;
            colors.normalColor = BTN_NORMAL;
            colors.highlightedColor = BTN_HOVER;
            colors.pressedColor = BTN_PRESS;
            colors.selectedColor = BTN_NORMAL;
            btn.colors = colors;
            
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(go.transform, false);
            var text = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            text.text = label;
            text.fontSize = 12;
            text.color = TEXT_NORMAL;
            text.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
            
            var textRect = textGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            return btn;
        }
        
        private GameObject CreateTextButton(Transform parent, string label, float w, float h)
        {
            var go = new GameObject(label);
            go.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
            
            var rect = go.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(w, h);
            
            var img = go.AddComponent<Image>();
            img.color = BTN_NORMAL;
            
            var btn = go.AddComponent<Button>();
            btn.targetGraphic = img;
            var colors = btn.colors;
            colors.normalColor = BTN_NORMAL;
            colors.highlightedColor = BTN_HOVER;
            colors.pressedColor = BTN_PRESS;
            btn.colors = colors;
            
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(go.transform, false);
            var text = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            text.text = label;
            text.fontSize = 13;
            text.color = TEXT_NORMAL;
            text.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
            
            var textRect = textGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            return go;
        }
        
        private void CreateSeparator(Transform parent)
        {
            var sep = new GameObject("Sep");
            sep.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
            
            var le = sep.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            le.preferredWidth = 2;
            le.preferredHeight = 20;
            
            var img = sep.AddComponent<Image>();
            img.color = BORDER;
        }
        
        private void AddSimpleTooltip(GameObject target, string text)
        {
            var trigger = target.AddComponent<TooltipTrigger>();
            trigger.TooltipText = text;
        }
        
        #endregion
        
        #region Show/Hide
        
        public void Show()
        {
            if (_windowCanvas != null)
            {
                _windowCanvas.enabled = true;
                CursorManager.SetCursor(false);
            }
        }
        
        public void Hide()
        {
            if (_windowCanvas != null)
            {
                SaveCurrentFile();
                _windowCanvas.enabled = false;
            }
        }
        
        public static void Toggle()
        {
            if (Instance == null) Initialize();
            
            if (IsOpen) Instance.Hide();
            else Instance.Show();
        }
        
        public static void UpdateWindow()
        {
            if (Instance == null || !IsOpen) return;
            
            if (UnityEngine.Input.GetKey(KeyCode.LeftControl) && UnityEngine.Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.S))
            {
                Instance.SaveCurrentFile();
                Instance.SaveFileSystem();
            }
            
            if (UnityEngine.Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.Escape))
            {
                Instance.Hide();
            }
        }
        
        #endregion
        
        #region File System
        
        private void LoadFileSystem()
        {
            _savePath = GetSavePath();
            var path = Path.Combine(_savePath, "planner_files.json");
            
            if (File.Exists(path))
            {
                try
                {
                    _fileSystem = JsonConvert.DeserializeObject<PlannerFileSystem>(File.ReadAllText(path));
                }
                catch
                {
                    _fileSystem = new PlannerFileSystem();
                }
            }
            else
            {
                _fileSystem = new PlannerFileSystem();
                // Welcome file
                _fileSystem.RootFolder.Files.Add(new PlannerFile
                {
                    Id = Guid.NewGuid().ToString(),
                    Name = "Welcome",
                    Content = "<size=120%><b><color=#FF7A18>Welcome to Station Planner!</color></b></size>\n\n" +
                             "Your personal note-taking space.\n\n" +
                             "<b>Shortcuts:</b>\n" +
                             "- <color=#FF7A18>F2</color> = Toggle window\n" +
                             "- <color=#FF7A18>Ctrl+S</color> = Save\n" +
                             "- <color=#FF7A18>Escape</color> = Close\n\n" +
                             "Click <color=#FF7A18>New</color> to create a note!"
                });
            }
            
            RefreshFileTree();
            if (_fileSystem.RootFolder.Files.Count > 0)
                SelectFile(_fileSystem.RootFolder.Files[0]);
        }
        
        private void SaveFileSystem()
        {
            if (_fileSystem == null) return;
            try
            {
                if (!Directory.Exists(_savePath))
                    Directory.CreateDirectory(_savePath);
                    
                File.WriteAllText(
                    Path.Combine(_savePath, "planner_files.json"),
                    JsonConvert.SerializeObject(_fileSystem, Formatting.Indented)
                );
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Debug.LogWarning($"[Station Planner] Save failed: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
        
        private string GetSavePath()
        {
            return Path.Combine(
                Environment.GetFolderPath(Environment.SpecialFolder.MyDocuments),
                "My Games", "Stationeers", "mods", "StationPlannerData"
            );
        }
        
        private void RefreshFileTree()
        {
            foreach (Transform child in _fileTreeContent)
                Destroy(child.gameObject);
                
            BuildFolder(_fileSystem.RootFolder, 0);
        }
        
        private void BuildFolder(PlannerFolder folder, int depth)
        {
            foreach (var sub in folder.SubFolders)
            {
                CreateFolderRow(sub, depth);
                if (sub.IsExpanded)
                    BuildFolder(sub, depth + 1);
            }
            
            foreach (var file in folder.Files)
                CreateFileRow(file, depth);
        }
        
        private void CreateFolderRow(PlannerFolder folder, int depth)
        {
            var row = new GameObject($"F_{folder.Name}");
            row.transform.SetParent(_fileTreeContent, false);
            
            var rect = row.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 22);
            
            var bg = row.AddComponent<Image>();
            bg.color = Color.clear;
            
            var hlg = row.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
            hlg.spacing = 4;
            hlg.padding = new RectOffset(depth * 10 + 4, 4, 2, 2);
            hlg.childAlignment = TextAnchor.MiddleLeft;
            hlg.childControlWidth = false;
            hlg.childControlHeight = true;
            
            // Arrow
            var arrowGO = new GameObject("Arrow");
            arrowGO.transform.SetParent(row.transform, false);
            var arrow = arrowGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            arrow.text = folder.IsExpanded ? "v" : ">";
            arrow.fontSize = 11;
            arrow.color = TEXT_DIM;
            var arrowLE = arrowGO.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            arrowLE.preferredWidth = 12;
            
            // Name
            var nameGO = new GameObject("Name");
            nameGO.transform.SetParent(row.transform, false);
            var nameText = nameGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            nameText.text = "[" + folder.Name + "]";
            nameText.fontSize = 12;
            nameText.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
            nameText.color = TEXT_NORMAL;
            var nameLE = nameGO.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            nameLE.flexibleWidth = 1;
            
            var btn = row.AddComponent<Button>();
            btn.targetGraphic = bg;
            var colors = btn.colors;
            colors.normalColor = Color.clear;
            colors.highlightedColor = new Color(0.2f, 0.3f, 0.4f, 0.4f);
            colors.pressedColor = SELECTED;
            btn.colors = colors;
            
            var f = folder;
            btn.onClick.AddListener(() => { f.IsExpanded = !f.IsExpanded; RefreshFileTree(); });
        }
        
        private void CreateFileRow(PlannerFile file, int depth)
        {
            var row = new GameObject($"f_{file.Name}");
            row.transform.SetParent(_fileTreeContent, false);
            
            var rect = row.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 22);
            
            bool selected = _currentFile == file;
            
            var bg = row.AddComponent<Image>();
            bg.color = selected ? SELECTED : Color.clear;
            
            var hlg = row.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
            hlg.spacing = 4;
            hlg.padding = new RectOffset(depth * 10 + 16, 4, 2, 2);
            hlg.childAlignment = TextAnchor.MiddleLeft;
            hlg.childControlWidth = false;
            hlg.childControlHeight = true;
            
            // Name
            var nameGO = new GameObject("Name");
            nameGO.transform.SetParent(row.transform, false);
            var nameText = nameGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            nameText.text = file.Name;
            nameText.fontSize = 12;
            nameText.color = selected ? ACCENT : TEXT_NORMAL;
            var nameLE = nameGO.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            nameLE.flexibleWidth = 1;
            
            var btn = row.AddComponent<Button>();
            btn.targetGraphic = bg;
            var colors = btn.colors;
            colors.normalColor = selected ? SELECTED : Color.clear;
            colors.highlightedColor = selected ? SELECTED : new Color(0.2f, 0.3f, 0.4f, 0.4f);
            colors.pressedColor = SELECTED;
            btn.colors = colors;
            
            var f = file;
            btn.onClick.AddListener(() => SelectFile(f));
        }
        
        private void SelectFile(PlannerFile file)
        {
            SaveCurrentFile();
            _currentFile = file;
            
            if (_editorInputField != null && file != null)
            {
                _editorInputField.text = file.Content ?? "";
                _editorInputField.caretPosition = 0;
            }
            
            if (_currentFileLabel != null)
                _currentFileLabel.text = file?.Name ?? "No file";
                
            _hasUnsavedChanges = false;
            RefreshFileTree();
        }
        
        private void SaveCurrentFile()
        {
            if (_currentFile != null && _editorInputField != null && _hasUnsavedChanges)
            {
                _currentFile.Content = _editorInputField.text;
                _currentFile.LastModified = DateTime.Now;
                _hasUnsavedChanges = false;
            }
        }
        
        #endregion
        
        #region Actions
        
        private void OnNewFile()
        {
            var file = new PlannerFile
            {
                Id = Guid.NewGuid().ToString(),
                Name = "Note " + (_fileSystem.RootFolder.Files.Count + 1),
                Content = ""
            };
            _fileSystem.RootFolder.Files.Add(file);
            SaveFileSystem();
            RefreshFileTree();
            SelectFile(file);
        }
        
        private void OnNewFolder()
        {
            var folder = new PlannerFolder
            {
                Id = Guid.NewGuid().ToString(),
                Name = "Folder " + (_fileSystem.RootFolder.SubFolders.Count + 1),
                IsExpanded = true
            };
            _fileSystem.RootFolder.SubFolders.Add(folder);
            SaveFileSystem();
            RefreshFileTree();
        }
        
        private void OnRename()
        {
            if (_currentFile == null) return;
            ShowInputDialog("Rename", _currentFile.Name, (newName) =>
            {
                if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(newName))
                {
                    _currentFile.Name = newName.Trim();
                    SaveFileSystem();
                    RefreshFileTree();
                    if (_currentFileLabel != null)
                        _currentFileLabel.text = _currentFile.Name;
                }
            });
        }
        
        private void OnDelete()
        {
            if (_currentFile == null) return;
            
            _fileSystem.RootFolder.Files.Remove(_currentFile);
            
            if (_fileSystem.RootFolder.Files.Count > 0)
                SelectFile(_fileSystem.RootFolder.Files[0]);
            else
            {
                _currentFile = null;
                if (_editorInputField != null)
                    _editorInputField.text = "";
                if (_currentFileLabel != null)
                    _currentFileLabel.text = "No file";
            }
            
            SaveFileSystem();
            RefreshFileTree();
        }
        
        private void ShowInputDialog(string title, string defaultValue, Action<string> onConfirm)
        {
            var dialog = new GameObject("InputDialog");
            dialog.transform.SetParent(_windowPanel.transform, false);
            
            var rect = dialog.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f);
            rect.anchorMax = new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f);
            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(280, 110);
            rect.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
            
            var bg = dialog.AddComponent<Image>();
            bg.color = BG_DARK;
            
            var outline = dialog.AddComponent<Outline>();
            outline.effectColor = ACCENT;
            outline.effectDistance = new Vector2(2, 2);
            
            // Title
            var titleGO = new GameObject("Title");
            titleGO.transform.SetParent(dialog.transform, false);
            var titleText = titleGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            titleText.text = title;
            titleText.fontSize = 14;
            titleText.fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
            titleText.color = ACCENT;
            titleText.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
            var titleRect = titleGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            titleRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            titleRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            titleRect.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);
            titleRect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(0, -8);
            titleRect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 22);
            
            // Input
            var inputGO = new GameObject("Input");
            inputGO.transform.SetParent(dialog.transform, false);
            var inputRect = inputGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            inputRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f);
            inputRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(0.5f, 0.5f);
            inputRect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(240, 28);
            inputRect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(0, 5);
            
            var inputBg = inputGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            inputBg.color = BG_INPUT;
            
            var textAreaGO = new GameObject("TextArea");
            textAreaGO.transform.SetParent(inputGO.transform, false);
            var textAreaRect = textAreaGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            textAreaRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textAreaRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textAreaRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(6, 0);
            textAreaRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-6, 0);
            
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(textAreaGO.transform, false);
            var textComp = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            textComp.fontSize = 13;
            textComp.color = TEXT_NORMAL;
            textComp.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.MidlineLeft;
            var textCompRect = textGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            textCompRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textCompRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textCompRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            textCompRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            var inputField = inputGO.AddComponent<TMP_InputField>();
            inputField.textComponent = textComp;
            inputField.textViewport = textAreaRect;
            inputField.text = defaultValue;
            inputField.caretColor = ACCENT;
            inputField.selectionColor = SELECTED;
            
            // Buttons
            var btnsGO = new GameObject("Buttons");
            btnsGO.transform.SetParent(dialog.transform, false);
            var btnsRect = btnsGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            btnsRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0.5f, 0);
            btnsRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(0.5f, 0);
            btnsRect.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 0);
            btnsRect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(0, 10);
            btnsRect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(180, 26);
            
            var hlg = btnsGO.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
            hlg.spacing = 10;
            hlg.childAlignment = TextAnchor.MiddleCenter;
            hlg.childControlWidth = false;
            hlg.childControlHeight = true;
            
            var okBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(btnsGO.transform, "OK", 70);
            okBtn.onClick.AddListener(() =>
            {
                onConfirm?.Invoke(inputField.text);
                Destroy(dialog);
            });
            
            var cancelBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(btnsGO.transform, "Cancel", 70);
            cancelBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => Destroy(dialog));
            
            // Focus input
            inputField.Select();
            inputField.ActivateInputField();
        }
        
        private void InsertTag(string open, string close)
        {
            if (_editorInputField == null) return;
            
            int start = Mathf.Min(_editorInputField.selectionAnchorPosition, _editorInputField.selectionFocusPosition);
            int end = Mathf.Max(_editorInputField.selectionAnchorPosition, _editorInputField.selectionFocusPosition);
            
            string text = _editorInputField.text;
            string selected = (end > start && end <= text.Length) ? text.Substring(start, end - start) : "";
            
            _editorInputField.text = text.Substring(0, start) + open + selected + close + text.Substring(end);
            _editorInputField.caretPosition = start + open.Length + selected.Length + close.Length;
            _hasUnsavedChanges = true;
        }
        
        private void InsertText(string txt)
        {
            if (_editorInputField == null) return;
            
            int pos = _editorInputField.caretPosition;
            _editorInputField.text = _editorInputField.text.Insert(pos, txt);
            _editorInputField.caretPosition = pos + txt.Length;
            _hasUnsavedChanges = true;
        }
        
        #endregion
    }
    
    #region Helper Components
    
    /// <summary>
    /// Window drag handler
    /// </summary>
    public class WindowDragHandler : MonoBehaviour, IBeginDragHandler, IDragHandler
    {
        public RectTransform WindowRect;
        private Vector2 _offset;
        
        public void OnBeginDrag(PointerEventData e)
        {
            if (WindowRect == null) return;
            RectTransformUtility.ScreenPointToLocalPointInRectangle(
                WindowRect.parent as RectTransform, e.position, e.pressEventCamera, out _offset);
            _offset = WindowRect.anchoredPosition - _offset;
        }
        
        public void OnDrag(PointerEventData e)
        {
            if (WindowRect == null) return;
            if (RectTransformUtility.ScreenPointToLocalPointInRectangle(
                WindowRect.parent as RectTransform, e.position, e.pressEventCamera, out Vector2 pos))
            {
                WindowRect.anchoredPosition = pos + _offset;
            }
        }
    }
    
    /// <summary>
    /// Window resize handler
    /// </summary>
    public class WindowResizeHandler : MonoBehaviour, IBeginDragHandler, IDragHandler
    {
        public RectTransform WindowRect;
        public Vector2 MinSize = new Vector2(400, 300);
        
        private Vector2 _startSize;
        private Vector2 _startMouse;
        
        public void OnBeginDrag(PointerEventData e)
        {
            if (WindowRect == null) return;
            _startSize = WindowRect.sizeDelta;
            _startMouse = e.position;
        }
        
        public void OnDrag(PointerEventData e)
        {
            if (WindowRect == null) return;
            Vector2 delta = e.position - _startMouse;
            Vector2 newSize = new Vector2(
                Mathf.Max(MinSize.x, _startSize.x + delta.x),
                Mathf.Max(MinSize.y, _startSize.y - delta.y)
            );
            WindowRect.sizeDelta = newSize;
        }
    }
    
    /// <summary>
    /// Simple tooltip trigger
    /// </summary>
    public class TooltipTrigger : MonoBehaviour, IPointerEnterHandler, IPointerExitHandler
    {
        public string TooltipText;
        private static GameObject _tooltip;
        private static TextMeshProUGUI _tooltipLabel;
        
        public void OnPointerEnter(PointerEventData e)
        {
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(TooltipText)) return;
            
            if (_tooltip == null)
            {
                var canvas = GetComponentInParent<Canvas>();
                if (canvas == null) return;
                
                _tooltip = new GameObject("Tooltip");
                _tooltip.transform.SetParent(canvas.transform, false);
                
                var rect = _tooltip.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
                rect.pivot = new Vector2(0, 1);
                
                var bg = _tooltip.AddComponent<Image>();
                bg.color = new Color(0.1f, 0.14f, 0.18f, 0.95f);
                
                var outline = _tooltip.AddComponent<Outline>();
                outline.effectColor = new Color(1f, 0.478f, 0.094f, 0.8f);
                outline.effectDistance = new Vector2(1, 1);
                
                var csf = _tooltip.AddComponent<ContentSizeFitter>();
                csf.horizontalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
                csf.verticalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
                
                var hlg = _tooltip.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
                hlg.padding = new RectOffset(6, 6, 3, 3);
                
                var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
                textGO.transform.SetParent(_tooltip.transform, false);
                _tooltipLabel = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
                _tooltipLabel.fontSize = 11;
                _tooltipLabel.color = new Color(0.9f, 0.9f, 0.9f, 1f);
            }
            
            _tooltipLabel.text = TooltipText;
            _tooltip.SetActive(true);
            _tooltip.GetComponent<RectTransform>().position = e.position + new Vector2(12, -18);
            LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(_tooltip.GetComponent<RectTransform>());
        }
        
        public void OnPointerExit(PointerEventData e)
        {
            if (_tooltip != null)
                _tooltip.SetActive(false);
        }
    }
    
    #endregion
}

```

```
            int mouseIndex = toggleMouse.transform.GetSiblingIndex();
            buttonGO.transform.SetSiblingIndex(mouseIndex);
```


</details></tool-use>

```
            // Input field setup
            var inputGO = new GameObject("Input");
            inputGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            var inputRect = inputGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            inputRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            inputRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            inputRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(6, 6);
            inputRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-6, -20);
            
            // Add raycast target image for input field to work
            var inputBg = inputGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            inputBg.color = new Color(0, 0, 0, 0.01f); // Nearly invisible but catches raycasts
            inputBg.raycastTarget = true;
            
            // Text area
            var textAreaGO = new GameObject("TextArea");
            textAreaGO.transform.SetParent(inputGO.transform, false);
            var textAreaRect = textAreaGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            textAreaRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textAreaRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textAreaRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            textAreaRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Add RectMask2D for text clipping
            textAreaGO.AddComponent<RectMask2D>();
            
            // Text component
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(textAreaGO.transform, false);
            var textComp = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            textComp.fontSize = 14;
            textComp.color = TEXT_NORMAL;
            textComp.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopLeft;
            textComp.enableWordWrapping = true;
            textComp.richText = true;
            textComp.overflowMode = TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
            textComp.raycastTarget = false; // Text shouldn't block raycasts
```

```
            // Placeholder
            var placeholderGO = new GameObject("Placeholder");
            placeholderGO.transform.SetParent(textAreaGO.transform, false);
            var placeholder = placeholderGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            placeholder.text = "Type your notes here...";
            placeholder.fontSize = 14;
            placeholder.color = TEXT_DIM;
            placeholder.fontStyle = FontStyles.Italic;
            placeholder.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopLeft;
            placeholder.raycastTarget = false; // Placeholder shouldn't block raycasts
            
            var phRect = placeholderGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            phRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            phRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            phRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            phRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Create input field
            _editorInputField = inputGO.AddComponent<TMP_InputField>();
            _editorInputField.textComponent = textComp;
            _editorInputField.placeholder = placeholder;
            _editorInputField.textViewport = textAreaRect;
            _editorInputField.lineType = TMP_InputField.LineType.MultiLineNewline;
            _editorInputField.richText = false; // Disable rich text input for better caret behavior
            _editorInputField.characterLimit = 0;
            _editorInputField.caretColor = ACCENT;
            _editorInputField.customCaretColor = true;
            _editorInputField.selectionColor = SELECTED;
            _editorInputField.caretWidth = 3;
            _editorInputField.caretBlinkRate = 0.85f;
            _editorInputField.onValueChanged.AddListener((_) => _hasUnsavedChanges = true);
            
            Debug.Log(\"[Station Planner] Editor panel created\");
        }
```

1. Need to call `ActivateInputField()` when the editor receives focus
2. Need to track `isFocused` state properly
3. Need proper raycast target on the input field background
4. Need `customCaretColor = true` and `caretColor` set

- `customCaretColor = true`
- `caretColor = ACCENT`
- `raycastTarget = true` on the input background

1. Calling `ActivateInputField()` when showing the window or selecting a file
2. Properly activating the input field when clicking on it
3. Maybe adding a click handler to focus the editor

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

The user wants the Station Planner to look exactly like the IC10 editor shown in the screenshot. Let me analyze the screenshot:

**IC10 Editor Visual Analysis:**
1. **Title Bar**: "EDIT SCRIPT" in white, bold, uppercase on the left. A pause icon "||" on the top right
2. **Toolbar Row 1**: LIBRARY, CLEAR, COPY, PASTE buttons (all caps, bordered boxes)
3. **Toolbar Row 2 (right side)**: Icon buttons - keyboard icon, s(x), x, f
4. **Main Editor Area**: 
   - Dark navy/black background
   - Line numbers on the left (2., 3., 4., etc.) in gray
   - Monospace font for code
   - Syntax highlighting with colors (yellow for commands like `lbn`, green for device refs, cyan for `ReferenceId`, orange for strings in quotes, white for regular text)
5. **Bottom Bar**: 
   - CANCEL button (left)
   - "Size 1998 / 4096 bytes" text (right)
   - CONFIRM button (right, with accent color)
6. **Window Frame**: Orange/amber border around the entire window

The key differences from our current Station Planner:
- IC10 has line numbers
- IC10 has a different toolbar layout
- IC10 has a bottom action bar with Cancel/Confirm
- IC10 uses a monospace font
- The overall styling is more polished with proper borders

Since this is a note-taking app (not code editor), we don't need syntax highlighting or line numbers necessarily. But the user wants the visual styling to match.

Let me rewrite the Station Planner to match the IC10 editor's visual style more closely:

1. Same dark navy background
2. Orange border around the window
3. Title bar with "STATION PLANNER" on left
4. Toolbar buttons in IC10 style (bordered, uppercase)


5. Bottom bar with Save/Cancel and file info
6. Same color scheme

I'll implement a comprehensive redesign that captures the essence of the IC10 editor's aesthetic. The goal is to create a visually consistent interface that feels familiar to users who have seen the original screenshot. This means paying close attention to color, typography, button styling, and overall layout to ensure a seamless visual experience.

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="create_file"><details>

- content:

```
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Text;
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
using UnityEngine.EventSystems;
using TMPro;
using Assets.Scripts.UI;

namespace StationpediaAscended.Debug
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Debug tool to inspect UI assets under the mouse cursor.
    /// Toggle with console command: assetdisplay
    /// </summary>
    public class UIAssetInspector : MonoBehaviour
    {
        public static UIAssetInspector Instance { get; private set; }
        public static bool IsEnabled { get; private set; } = false;
        
        private Canvas _tooltipCanvas;
        private GameObject _tooltipPanel;
        private TextMeshProUGUI _tooltipText;
        private RectTransform _tooltipRect;
        
        private PointerEventData _pointerData;
        private List<RaycastResult> _raycastResults = new List<RaycastResult>();
        private StringBuilder _sb = new StringBuilder();
        
        // Colors for the tooltip
        private static readonly Color BG_COLOR = new Color(0.05f, 0.05f, 0.1f, 0.95f);
        private static readonly Color BORDER_COLOR = new Color(0f, 1f, 0.5f, 1f); // Green for debug
        private static readonly Color TEXT_COLOR = new Color(0.9f, 1f, 0.9f, 1f);
        
        public static void Initialize()
        {
            if (Instance != null) return;
            
            var go = new GameObject("UIAssetInspector");
            Instance = go.AddComponent<UIAssetInspector>();
            DontDestroyOnLoad(go);
            
            Instance.CreateTooltip();
            Instance.SetEnabled(false);
            
            UnityEngine.Debug.Log("[UIAssetInspector] Initialized. Use 'assetdisplay' command to toggle.");
        }
        
        public static void Toggle()
        {
            if (Instance == null) Initialize();
            Instance.SetEnabled(!IsEnabled);
        }
        
        public static void Cleanup()
        {
            if (Instance != null)
            {
                if (Instance._tooltipCanvas != null)
                    Destroy(Instance._tooltipCanvas.gameObject);
                Destroy(Instance.gameObject);
                Instance = null;
            }
        }
        
        private void SetEnabled(bool enabled)
        {
            IsEnabled = enabled;
            if (_tooltipCanvas != null)
                _tooltipCanvas.enabled = enabled;
                
            UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"[UIAssetInspector] {(enabled ? "ENABLED" : "DISABLED")}");
        }
        
        private void CreateTooltip()
        {
            // Create canvas for tooltip (highest sort order to always be on top)
            var canvasGO = new GameObject("AssetInspectorCanvas");
            canvasGO.transform.SetParent(transform);
            
            _tooltipCanvas = canvasGO.AddComponent<Canvas>();
            _tooltipCanvas.renderMode = RenderMode.ScreenSpaceOverlay;
            _tooltipCanvas.sortingOrder = 32000; // Very high to be on top of everything
            
            var scaler = canvasGO.AddComponent<CanvasScaler>();
            scaler.uiScaleMode = CanvasScaler.ScaleMode.ScaleWithScreenSize;
            scaler.referenceResolution = new Vector2(1920, 1080);
            
            // Don't add GraphicRaycaster - we don't want this to block raycasts
            
            // Create tooltip panel
            _tooltipPanel = new GameObject("TooltipPanel");
            _tooltipPanel.transform.SetParent(canvasGO.transform, false);
            
            _tooltipRect = _tooltipPanel.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            _tooltipRect.pivot = new Vector2(0, 1); // Top-left pivot
            _tooltipRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 0);
            _tooltipRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(0, 0);
            
            var bg = _tooltipPanel.AddComponent<Image>();
            bg.color = BG_COLOR;
            bg.raycastTarget = false;
            
            var outline = _tooltipPanel.AddComponent<Outline>();
            outline.effectColor = BORDER_COLOR;
            outline.effectDistance = new Vector2(2, 2);
            
            // Content size fitter
            var csf = _tooltipPanel.AddComponent<ContentSizeFitter>();
            csf.horizontalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
            csf.verticalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
            
            var vlg = _tooltipPanel.AddComponent<VerticalLayoutGroup>();
            vlg.padding = new RectOffset(10, 10, 8, 8);
            vlg.childAlignment = TextAnchor.UpperLeft;
            vlg.childControlWidth = true;
            vlg.childControlHeight = true;
            
            // Text
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(_tooltipPanel.transform, false);
            
            _tooltipText = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            _tooltipText.fontSize = 12;
            _tooltipText.color = TEXT_COLOR;
            _tooltipText.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopLeft;
            _tooltipText.enableWordWrapping = false;
            _tooltipText.overflowMode = TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
            _tooltipText.raycastTarget = false;
            _tooltipText.richText = true;
            
            var textLE = textGO.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            textLE.minWidth = 200;
            textLE.minHeight = 50;
        }
        
        void Update()
        {
            if (!IsEnabled || _tooltipCanvas == null) return;
            
            // Position tooltip near mouse
            Vector2 mousePos = Input.mousePosition;
            _tooltipRect.position = mousePos + new Vector2(20, -20);
            
            // Clamp to screen
            Vector2 size = _tooltipRect.sizeDelta;
            float maxX = Screen.width - size.x - 10;
            float minY = size.y + 10;
            
            if (_tooltipRect.position.x > maxX)
                _tooltipRect.position = new Vector2(mousePos.x - size.x - 20, _tooltipRect.position.y);
            if (_tooltipRect.position.y < minY)
                _tooltipRect.position = new Vector2(_tooltipRect.position.x, mousePos.y + size.y + 20);
            
            // Raycast to find UI elements
            UpdateTooltipContent();
        }
        
        private void UpdateTooltipContent()
        {
            _sb.Clear();
            _sb.AppendLine("<color=#00FF80><b>UI ASSET INSPECTOR</b></color>");
            _sb.AppendLine("<color=#808080>─────────────────────</color>");
            
            // Get all EventSystems and raycast
            var eventSystem = EventSystem.current;
            if (eventSystem == null)
            {
                _sb.AppendLine("<color=#FF8080>No EventSystem found</color>");
                _tooltipText.text = _sb.ToString();
                return;
            }
            
            if (_pointerData == null)
                _pointerData = new PointerEventData(eventSystem);
            
            _pointerData.position = Input.mousePosition;
            _raycastResults.Clear();
            
            // Raycast all
            eventSystem.RaycastAll(_pointerData, _raycastResults);
            
            if (_raycastResults.Count == 0)
            {
                _sb.AppendLine("<color=#FFFF80>No UI elements under cursor</color>");
            }
            else
            {
                _sb.AppendLine($"<color=#80FFFF>Found {_raycastResults.Count} element(s):</color>\n");
                
                int count = 0;
                foreach (var result in _raycastResults)
                {
                    if (count >= 8) // Limit to prevent huge tooltips
                    {
                        _sb.AppendLine($"<color=#808080>... and {_raycastResults.Count - count} more</color>");
                        break;
                    }
                    
                    var go = result.gameObject;
                    if (go == null) continue;
                    
                    // Skip our own inspector tooltip
                    if (go.transform.IsChildOf(transform)) continue;
                    
                    AppendGameObjectInfo(go, count + 1);
                    count++;
                }
            }
            
            _tooltipText.text = _sb.ToString();
            LayoutRebuilder.ForceRebuildLayoutImmediate(_tooltipRect);
        }
        
        private void AppendGameObjectInfo(GameObject go, int index)
        {
            _sb.AppendLine($"<color=#FFD700>[{index}] {go.name}</color>");
            
            // Get hierarchy path (up to 3 levels)
            string path = GetHierarchyPath(go.transform, 3);
            _sb.AppendLine($"  <color=#A0A0A0>Path: {path}</color>");
            
            // Check for Image component and sprite
            var image = go.GetComponent<Image>();
            if (image != null)
            {
                _sb.Append("  <color=#80FF80>Image:</color> ");
                if (image.sprite != null)
                {
                    _sb.AppendLine($"<color=#FFFFFF>{image.sprite.name}</color>");
                    if (image.sprite.texture != null)
                        _sb.AppendLine($"    <color=#808080>Texture: {image.sprite.texture.name}</color>");
                }
                else
                {
                    _sb.AppendLine("<color=#808080>(no sprite)</color>");
                }
                _sb.AppendLine($"    <color=#808080>Color: {ColorToHex(image.color)}</color>");
                
                // Check if it's a TranslucentImage
                var translucentImage = go.GetComponent<LeTai.Asset.TranslucentImage.TranslucentImage>();
                if (translucentImage != null)
                {
                    _sb.AppendLine($"    <color=#FF80FF>TranslucentImage: spriteBlending={translucentImage.spriteBlending:F2}</color>");
                }
            }
            
            // Check for RawImage
            var rawImage = go.GetComponent<RawImage>();
            if (rawImage != null)
            {
                _sb.Append("  <color=#80FF80>RawImage:</color> ");
                if (rawImage.texture != null)
                    _sb.AppendLine($"<color=#FFFFFF>{rawImage.texture.name}</color>");
                else
                    _sb.AppendLine("<color=#808080>(no texture)</color>");
            }
            
            // Check for TextMeshProUGUI
            var tmp = go.GetComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            if (tmp != null)
            {
                string textPreview = tmp.text;
                if (textPreview.Length > 30)
                    textPreview = textPreview.Substring(0, 30) + "...";
                textPreview = textPreview.Replace("\n", "\\n").Replace("<", "〈").Replace(">", "〉");
                
                _sb.AppendLine($"  <color=#80FFFF>TMP:</color> \"{textPreview}\"");
                if (tmp.font != null)
                    _sb.AppendLine($"    <color=#808080>Font: {tmp.font.name}</color>");
            }
            
            // Check for Button
            var button = go.GetComponent<Button>();
            if (button != null)
            {
                _sb.AppendLine($"  <color=#FFFF80>Button</color>");
            }
            
            // Check for UiComponentRenderer
            var uiRenderer = go.GetComponent<UiComponentRenderer>();
            if (uiRenderer != null)
            {
                _sb.AppendLine($"  <color=#FF8080>UiComponentRenderer</color>");
            }
            
            // Check for Canvas
            var canvas = go.GetComponent<Canvas>();
            if (canvas != null)
            {
                _sb.AppendLine($"  <color=#8080FF>Canvas: sortOrder={canvas.sortingOrder}</color>");
            }
            
            // List other notable components
            var components = go.GetComponents<Component>();
            foreach (var comp in components)
            {
                if (comp == null) continue;
                string typeName = comp.GetType().Name;
                
                // Skip common/already listed components
                if (typeName == "RectTransform" || typeName == "CanvasRenderer" || 
                    typeName == "Image" || typeName == "RawImage" || typeName == "Button" ||
                    typeName == "TextMeshProUGUI" || typeName == "Canvas" || 
                    typeName == "UiComponentRenderer" || typeName == "TranslucentImage")
                    continue;
                
                // Show interesting components
                if (typeName.Contains("Scroll") || typeName.Contains("Layout") || 
                    typeName.Contains("Mask") || typeName.Contains("Input") ||
                    typeName.Contains("Toggle") || typeName.Contains("Slider") ||
                    typeName.Contains("Dropdown") || typeName.Contains("Editor"))
                {
                    _sb.AppendLine($"  <color=#C0C0C0>{typeName}</color>");
                }
            }
            
            _sb.AppendLine();
        }
        
        private string GetHierarchyPath(Transform t, int maxDepth)
        {
            if (t == null || maxDepth <= 0) return "";
            
            var parts = new List<string>();
            var current = t;
            int depth = 0;
            
            while (current != null && depth < maxDepth)
            {
                parts.Insert(0, current.name);
                current = current.parent;
                depth++;
            }
            
            if (current != null)
                parts.Insert(0, "...");
            
            return string.Join("/", parts);
        }
        
        private string ColorToHex(Color c)
        {
            return $"#{ColorUtility.ToHtmlStringRGBA(c)}";
        }
    }
}

```

```
private static string CurrentPageKeyCommand(string[] args)
        {
            try
            {
                string currentKey = Stationpedia.CurrentPageKey;
                if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(currentKey))
                {
                    return "No page currently open";
                }
                return $"Current page deviceKey: {currentKey}";
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                return $"Error: {ex.Message}";
            }
        }
        
        private static string AssetDisplayCommand(string[] args)
        {
            try
            {
                UIAssetInspector.Toggle();
                bool isEnabled = UIAssetInspector.IsEnabled;
                return $"UI Asset Inspector: {(isEnabled ? "ENABLED - hover over UI elements to see asset names" : "DISABLED")}";
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                return $"Error toggling UI Asset Inspector: {ex.Message}";
            }
        }
```

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Register custom console commands
        /// </summary>
        private void RegisterConsoleCommands()
        {
            try
            {
                var commandsMap = Util.Commands.CommandLine.CommandsMap;
                
                // Register "stationpediacenter" command to center the Stationpedia window
                if (!commandsMap.ContainsKey("stationpediacenter"))
                {
                    Util.Commands.CommandLine.AddCommand("stationpediacenter", 
                        new Util.Commands.BasicCommand(CenterStationpediaCommand, 
                            "Centers the Stationpedia window on screen", null, false));
                }
                
                // Register "spda_dumpkeys" command to export all page keys
                if (!commandsMap.ContainsKey("spda_dumpkeys"))
                {
                    Util.Commands.CommandLine.AddCommand("spda_dumpkeys", 
                        new Util.Commands.BasicCommand(DumpPageKeysCommand, 
                            "Exports all Stationpedia page keys to a file for use in descriptions.json", null, false));
                }
                
                // Register "spda_currentkey" command to show current page key
                if (!commandsMap.ContainsKey("spda_currentkey"))
                {
                    Util.Commands.CommandLine.AddCommand("spda_currentkey", 
                        new Util.Commands.BasicCommand(CurrentPageKeyCommand, 
                            "Shows the deviceKey of the currently open Stationpedia page", null, false));
                }
                
                // Register "assetdisplay" command to toggle the UI Asset Inspector (debug tool)
                if (!commandsMap.ContainsKey("assetdisplay"))
                {
                    Util.Commands.CommandLine.AddCommand("assetdisplay", 
                        new Util.Commands.BasicCommand(AssetDisplayCommand, 
                            "Toggles the UI Asset Inspector to show asset names under mouse cursor", null, false));
                }
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Log?.LogError($"Error registering console commands: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
```

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Register custom console commands
        /// </summary>
        private void RegisterConsoleCommands()
        {
            try
            {
                // Check if command already exists (for F6 reload)
                if (Util.Commands.CommandLine.CommandsMap.ContainsKey("stationpediacenter"))
                {
                    return; // Already registered
                }
                
                // Register "stationpediacenter" command to center the Stationpedia window
                Util.Commands.CommandLine.AddCommand("stationpediacenter", 
                    new Util.Commands.BasicCommand(CenterStationpediaCommand, 
                        "Centers the Stationpedia window on screen", null, false));
                
                // Register "spda_dumpkeys" command to export all page keys
                Util.Commands.CommandLine.AddCommand("spda_dumpkeys", 
                    new Util.Commands.BasicCommand(DumpPageKeysCommand, 
                        "Exports all Stationpedia page keys to a file for use in descriptions.json", null, false));
                
                // Register "spda_currentkey" command to show current page key
                Util.Commands.CommandLine.AddCommand("spda_currentkey", 
                    new Util.Commands.BasicCommand(CurrentPageKeyCommand, 
                        "Shows the deviceKey of the currently open Stationpedia page", null, false));
                
                // Register "assetdisplay" command to toggle the UI Asset Inspector (debug tool)
                Util.Commands.CommandLine.AddCommand("assetdisplay", 
                    new Util.Commands.BasicCommand(AssetDisplayCommand, 
                        "Toggles the UI Asset Inspector to show asset names under mouse cursor", null, false));
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Log?.LogError($"Error registering console commands: {ex.Message}");
            }
        }
```

```
        {
            // Find and destroy any existing UIAssetInspector by name (handles hot reload across assemblies)

            DontDestroyOnLoad(go);
            
            Instance.CreateTooltip();
            Instance.SetEnabled(false);
            
            UnityEngine.Debug.Log("[UIAssetInspector] Initialized. Use 'assetdisplay' command to toggle.");
        }
```
