<tool-use data-tool-type="generic" data-tool-name="multi_replace_string_in_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **multi_replace_string_in_file**</summary>

**Input:**

- explanation: `Fix TMP_InputField structure for proper cursor/text entry, update toolbar buttons with IC10 sprite styling, and fix button scaling with window resize`
- replacements:

```
[map[explanation:Fix CreateEditorPanel to use proper TMP_InputField structure that shows cursor - remove the complex scroll/content hierarchy and use simpler approach filePath:c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaAscended\mod\src\UI\StationPlanner\StationPlannerWindow.cs newString:        /// <summary>
        /// Creates the editor panel with IC10-style sprite layering and proper TMP_InputField
        /// </summary>
        private void CreateEditorPanel(Transform parent)
        {
            // Editor container - positioned to the right of file tree
            var panel = CreatePanel(parent, "Editor", 0, 0);
            var rect = panel.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            rect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            rect.offsetMin = new Vector2(FILE_TREE_WIDTH + 5, 0);
            rect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // IC10 style layering for editor panel (PanelInputCode style)
            // Layer 1: Inner shadow/background - black with 75% opacity
            var innerBgGO = new GameObject("InnerBg");
            innerBgGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            var innerBgRect = innerBgGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            innerBgRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            innerBgRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            innerBgRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            innerBgRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            var innerBg = innerBgGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            innerBg.color = new Color(0, 0, 0, 0.75f); // #000000BF
            innerBg.raycastTarget = false; // Don't block input
            
            // Current file label
            var labelGO = new GameObject("FileLabel");
            labelGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            _currentFileLabel = labelGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            _currentFileLabel.text = "No file selected";
            _currentFileLabel.fontSize = 11;
            _currentFileLabel.color = TEXT_DIM;
            _currentFileLabel.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopRight;
            _currentFileLabel.raycastTarget = false;
            
            var labelRect = labelGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            labelRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            labelRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            labelRect.pivot = new Vector2(1, 1);
            labelRect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-5, -2);
            labelRect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 16);
            
            // === TMP_InputField setup (following Unity's required structure) ===
            // The hierarchy must be: InputField -> TextArea (viewport) -> Text + Placeholder
            
            // Input field root container
            var inputGO = new GameObject("InputField");
            inputGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            var inputRect = inputGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            inputRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            inputRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            inputRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(8, 8);
            inputRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-8, -20);
            
            // Raycast background for input field - CRITICAL for receiving clicks
            var inputBg = inputGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            inputBg.color = new Color(0, 0, 0, 0.01f); // Nearly invisible but catches raycasts
            inputBg.raycastTarget = true;
            
            // Text Area (this is the viewport for TMP_InputField)
            var textAreaGO = new GameObject("Text Area");
            textAreaGO.transform.SetParent(inputGO.transform, false);
            var textAreaRect = textAreaGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            textAreaRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textAreaRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textAreaRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(4, 4);
            textAreaRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-4, -4);
            
            // RectMask2D on the text area to clip text
            textAreaGO.AddComponent<RectMask2D>();
            
            // Placeholder - child of Text Area
            var placeholderGO = new GameObject("Placeholder");
            placeholderGO.transform.SetParent(textAreaGO.transform, false);
            var placeholder = placeholderGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            placeholder.text = "Type your notes here...";
            placeholder.fontSize = 14;
            placeholder.color = TEXT_DIM;
            placeholder.fontStyle = FontStyles.Italic;
            placeholder.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopLeft;
            placeholder.raycastTarget = false;
            placeholder.enableWordWrapping = true;
            
            var phRect = placeholderGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            phRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            phRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            phRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            phRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Text component - child of Text Area
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(textAreaGO.transform, false);
            var textComp = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            textComp.fontSize = 14;
            textComp.color = TEXT_NORMAL;
            textComp.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopLeft;
            textComp.enableWordWrapping = true;
            textComp.richText = false; // Plain text for editing
            textComp.overflowMode = TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
            textComp.raycastTarget = false;
            
            var textRect = textGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Create TMP_InputField component on the root
            _editorInputField = inputGO.AddComponent<TMP_InputField>();
            _editorInputField.textComponent = textComp;
            _editorInputField.placeholder = placeholder;
            _editorInputField.textViewport = textAreaRect;
            _editorInputField.lineType = TMP_InputField.LineType.MultiLineNewline;
            _editorInputField.richText = false;
            _editorInputField.characterLimit = 0;
            
            // IC10 style caret (orange, blinking)
            _editorInputField.caretColor = ACCENT;
            _editorInputField.customCaretColor = true;
            _editorInputField.selectionColor = SELECTED;
            _editorInputField.caretWidth = 2;
            _editorInputField.caretBlinkRate = 0.85f;
            
            // Hook up events
            _editorInputField.onValueChanged.AddListener((_) => _hasUnsavedChanges = true);
            
            // Force activate on select to ensure caret shows
            _editorInputField.onSelect.AddListener((s) => {
                _editorInputField.ActivateInputField();
            });
            
            Debug.Log("[Station Planner] Editor panel created with TMP_InputField");
        } oldString:        /// <summary>
        /// Creates the editor panel with IC10-style sprite layering and scrollbar
        /// </summary>
        private void CreateEditorPanel(Transform parent)
        {
            // Editor container - positioned to the right of file tree
            var panel = CreatePanel(parent, "Editor", 0, 0);
            var rect = panel.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            rect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            rect.offsetMin = new Vector2(FILE_TREE_WIDTH + 5, 0);
            rect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // IC10 style layering for editor panel (PanelInputCode style)
            // Layer 1: Inner shadow/background - black with 75% opacity
            var innerBgGO = new GameObject("InnerBg");
            innerBgGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            var innerBgRect = innerBgGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            innerBgRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            innerBgRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            innerBgRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            innerBgRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            var innerBg = innerBgGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            innerBg.color = new Color(0, 0, 0, 0.75f); // #000000BF
            innerBg.raycastTarget = true;
            
            // Current file label
            var labelGO = new GameObject("FileLabel");
            labelGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            _currentFileLabel = labelGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            _currentFileLabel.text = "No file selected";
            _currentFileLabel.fontSize = 11;
            _currentFileLabel.color = TEXT_DIM;
            _currentFileLabel.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopRight;
            
            var labelRect = labelGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            labelRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            labelRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            labelRect.pivot = new Vector2(1, 1);
            labelRect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-5, -2);
            labelRect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 16);
            
            // Create scroll view for editor content
            var scrollViewGO = new GameObject("EditorScrollView");
            scrollViewGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            var scrollRect = scrollViewGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            scrollRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            scrollRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            scrollRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(6, 6);
            scrollRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-6, -20);
            
            var editorScrollRect = scrollViewGO.AddComponent<ScrollRect>();
            editorScrollRect.horizontal = false;
            editorScrollRect.vertical = true;
            editorScrollRect.movementType = ScrollRect.MovementType.Elastic;
            editorScrollRect.scrollSensitivity = 30f;
            
            // Viewport for scroll view
            var viewportGO = new GameObject("Viewport");
            viewportGO.transform.SetParent(scrollViewGO.transform, false);
            var viewportRect = viewportGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            viewportRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            viewportRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            viewportRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            viewportRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-14, 0); // Leave room for scrollbar
            
            var viewportMask = viewportGO.AddComponent<RectMask2D>();
            var viewportImg = viewportGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            viewportImg.color = new Color(0, 0, 0, 0.01f);
            viewportImg.raycastTarget = true;
            
            editorScrollRect.viewport = viewportRect;
            
            // Content container for input field
            var contentGO = new GameObject("Content");
            contentGO.transform.SetParent(viewportGO.transform, false);
            var contentRect = contentGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            contentRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            contentRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            contentRect.pivot = new Vector2(0, 1);
            contentRect.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
            contentRect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 0);
            
            var contentCSF = contentGO.AddComponent<ContentSizeFitter>();
            contentCSF.verticalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
            
            editorScrollRect.content = contentRect;
            
            // Input field container
            var inputGO = new GameObject("Input");
            inputGO.transform.SetParent(contentGO.transform, false);
            var inputRect = inputGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            inputRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            inputRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            inputRect.pivot = new Vector2(0, 1);
            inputRect.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
            inputRect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 500); // Will be controlled by layout
            
            // Add raycast target image for input field to work
            var inputBg = inputGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            inputBg.color = new Color(0, 0, 0, 0.01f); // Nearly invisible but catches raycasts
            inputBg.raycastTarget = true;
            
            var inputLE = inputGO.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            inputLE.minHeight = 400;
            inputLE.flexibleHeight = 1;
            
            // Text area
            var textAreaGO = new GameObject("TextArea");
            textAreaGO.transform.SetParent(inputGO.transform, false);
            var textAreaRect = textAreaGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            textAreaRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textAreaRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textAreaRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            textAreaRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Text component
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(textAreaGO.transform, false);
            var textComp = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            textComp.fontSize = 14;
            textComp.color = TEXT_NORMAL;
            textComp.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopLeft;
            textComp.enableWordWrapping = true;
            textComp.richText = true;
            textComp.overflowMode = TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
            textComp.raycastTarget = false;
            
            var textRect = textGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Placeholder
            var placeholderGO = new GameObject("Placeholder");
            placeholderGO.transform.SetParent(textAreaGO.transform, false);
            var placeholder = placeholderGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            placeholder.text = "Type your notes here...";
            placeholder.fontSize = 14;
            placeholder.color = TEXT_DIM;
            placeholder.fontStyle = FontStyles.Italic;
            placeholder.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopLeft;
            placeholder.raycastTarget = false;
            
            var phRect = placeholderGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            phRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            phRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            phRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            phRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Create input field - IC10 style caret (orange, blinking)
            _editorInputField = inputGO.AddComponent<TMP_InputField>();
            _editorInputField.textComponent = textComp;
            _editorInputField.placeholder = placeholder;
            _editorInputField.textViewport = textAreaRect;
            _editorInputField.lineType = TMP_InputField.LineType.MultiLineNewline;
            _editorInputField.richText = false;
            _editorInputField.characterLimit = 0;
            _editorInputField.caretColor = ACCENT; // Orange caret like IC10
            _editorInputField.customCaretColor = true;
            _editorInputField.selectionColor = SELECTED;
            _editorInputField.caretWidth = 2;
            _editorInputField.caretBlinkRate = 0.85f; // Standard blink rate
            _editorInputField.onValueChanged.AddListener((_) => _hasUnsavedChanges = true);
            
            // Add click handler to focus the input field (like IC10's EditorLineOfCode)
            var clickHandler = inputGO.AddComponent<EditorClickHandler>();
            clickHandler.InputField = _editorInputField;
            
            // Create IC10-style scrollbar
            CreateIC10Scrollbar(scrollViewGO.transform, editorScrollRect);
            
            Debug.Log("[Station Planner] Editor panel created with IC10 styling");
        }] map[explanation:Update CreateToolbarBtn to use IC10-style button-bg sprite with proper scaling support filePath:c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaAscended\mod\src\UI\StationPlanner\StationPlannerWindow.cs newString:        private Button CreateToolbarBtn(Transform parent, string label, float width)
        {
            var go = new GameObject(label);
            go.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
            
            var rectT = go.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            
            var le = go.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            le.preferredWidth = width;
            le.preferredHeight = 24;
            le.minWidth = width;
            le.flexibleWidth = 0; // Don't stretch
            
            // Use IC10-style button-bg sprite
            var img = go.AddComponent<Image>();

            if (buttonSprite != null)
            {
                img.sprite = buttonSprite;
                img.type = Image.Type.Sliced;
            }
            img.color = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 0.1f); // #FFFFFF10 like IC10 buttons
            
            var btn = go.AddComponent<Button>();
            btn.targetGraphic = img;
            var colors = btn.colors;
            colors.normalColor = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 0.1f);      // #FFFFFF10
            colors.highlightedColor = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 0.2f); // #FFFFFF33 on hover
            colors.pressedColor = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 0.3f);     // #FFFFFF4D on press
            colors.selectedColor = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 0.15f);
            btn.colors = colors;
            
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(go.transform, false);
            var text = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            text.text = label;
            text.fontSize = 12;
            text.color = TEXT_NORMAL;
            text.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
            
            var textRect = textGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            return btn;

[map[explanation:Update constants with new toolbar height and add IC10 button colors filePath:c:\Dev\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\StationpediaAscended\mod\src\UI\StationPlanner\StationPlannerWindow.cs newString:        #region Constants
        
        private const float MIN_WIDTH = 500f;
        private const float MIN_HEIGHT = 350f;
        private const float DEFAULT_WIDTH = 700f;
        private const float DEFAULT_HEIGHT = 480f;
        private const float TITLE_BAR_HEIGHT = 36f;  // Increased for better padding
        private const float TOOLBAR_HEIGHT = 36f;    // Taller for 2-row layout when needed
        private const float FILE_TREE_WIDTH = 180f;
        
        // Stationeers IC10 editor colors (researched from UI inspector)
        // IC10 buttons use button-bg sprite with color #FFFFFF10 (white at 6.3% opacity)
        private static readonly Color BG_DARK = new Color(0.035f, 0.055f, 0.082f, 0.98f);     // Very dark navy background
        private static readonly Color BG_PANEL = new Color(0.055f, 0.082f, 0.118f, 0.95f);     // Slightly lighter panel
        private static readonly Color BG_INPUT = new Color(0.025f, 0.04f, 0.065f, 1f);         // Input field background (darkest)
        private static readonly Color ACCENT = new Color(0.984f, 0.69f, 0.231f, 1f);           // Orange #FBB03B (game's highlight color)
        private static readonly Color ACCENT_ORANGE = new Color(0.996f, 0.353f, 0.086f, 1f);   // Brighter orange #FF5A16 for outlines
        private static readonly Color TEXT_NORMAL = new Color(0.9f, 0.9f, 0.9f, 1f);           // White text
        private static readonly Color TEXT_DIM = new Color(0.5f, 0.55f, 0.6f, 1f);             // Dimmed text
        private static readonly Color BORDER = new Color(0.984f, 0.69f, 0.231f, 0.8f);         // Orange border
        // IC10-accurate button colors - darker blue matching the game
        private static readonly Color BTN_NORMAL = new Color(0.08f, 0.12f, 0.18f, 0.9f);       // Darker blue-gray to match IC10

        {
            var go = new GameObject(label);
            go.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
            go.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            
            var le = go.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            le.preferredWidth = width;
            le.preferredHeight = 26;
            le.minWidth = 26; // Allow shrinking but keep minimum
            le.flexibleWidth = 0;
            
            // Use IC10-style button-bg sprite with darker blue color
            var img = go.AddComponent<Image>();
            var buttonSprite = LoadSlicedSprite("button-bg.png", 4);
            if (buttonSprite != null)
            {
                img.sprite = buttonSprite;
                img.type = Image.Type.Sliced;
            }
            img.color = BTN_NORMAL; // Darker blue matching IC10
            
            var btn = go.AddComponent<Button>();
            btn.targetGraphic = img;
            var colors = btn.colors;
            colors.normalColor = BTN_NORMAL;
            colors.highlightedColor = BTN_HOVER;
            colors.pressedColor = BTN_PRESS;
            colors.selectedColor = BTN_NORMAL;
            colors.colorMultiplier = 1f;
            colors.fadeDuration = 0.1f;
            btn.colors = colors;
            
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(go.transform, false);
            var text = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            text.text = label;
            text.fontSize = 12;
            text.color = TEXT_NORMAL;
            text.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.Center;
            text.raycastTarget = false;
            
            var textRect = textGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(2, 0);
            textRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-2, 0);
            
            _toolbarButtons.Add(btn);
            return btn;
        } oldString:        private Button CreateToolbarBtn(Transform parent, string label, float width)

            _toolbarButtons.Clear();
            
            // File buttons - simple text, no unicode
            var newFileBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_toolbarContainer.transform, "New", 45);
            newFileBtn.onClick.AddListener(OnNewFile);
            AddSimpleTooltip(newFileBtn.gameObject, "Create new file");
            
            var newFolderBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_toolbarContainer.transform, "Folder", 55);
            newFolderBtn.onClick.AddListener(OnNewFolder);
            AddSimpleTooltip(newFolderBtn.gameObject, "Create new folder");
            
            var renameBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_toolbarContainer.transform, "Rename", 60);
            renameBtn.onClick.AddListener(OnRename);
            AddSimpleTooltip(renameBtn.gameObject, "Rename selected");
            
            var deleteBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_toolbarContainer.transform, "Delete", 55);
            deleteBtn.onClick.AddListener(OnDelete);
            AddSimpleTooltip(deleteBtn.gameObject, "Delete selected");
            
            var saveBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_toolbarContainer.transform, "Save", 45);
            saveBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => { SaveCurrentFile(); SaveFileSystem(); });
            AddSimpleTooltip(saveBtn.gameObject, "Save (Ctrl+S)");
            
            // Separator with orange rounded corners
            CreateSeparator(_toolbarContainer.transform);
            
            // Formatting buttons
            var boldBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_toolbarContainer.transform, "B", 28);
            boldBtn.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>().fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
            boldBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => InsertTag("<b>", "</b>"));
            AddSimpleTooltip(boldBtn.gameObject, "Bold");
            
            var italicBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_toolbarContainer.transform, "I", 28);
            italicBtn.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>().fontStyle = FontStyles.Italic;
            italicBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => InsertTag("<i>", "</i>"));
            AddSimpleTooltip(italicBtn.gameObject, "Italic");
            
            var headerBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_toolbarContainer.transform, "H", 28);
            headerBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => InsertTag("<size=120%><b>", "</b></size>"));
            AddSimpleTooltip(headerBtn.gameObject, "Header");
            
            var colorBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_toolbarContainer.transform, "C", 28);
            colorBtn.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>().color = ACCENT;
            colorBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => InsertTag("<color=#FBB03B>", "</color>"));
            AddSimpleTooltip(colorBtn.gameObject, "Orange color");
            
            var bulletBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_toolbarContainer.transform, "-", 28);
            bulletBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => InsertText("\n- "));
            AddSimpleTooltip(bulletBtn.gameObject, "Bullet point");
        }

        private void CreateFileTreePanel(Transform parent)
        {
            var panel = CreatePanel(parent, "FileTree", FILE_TREE_WIDTH, 0);
            var rect = panel.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 0);
            rect.anchorMax = new Vector2(0, 1);
            rect.pivot = new Vector2(0, 0.5f);
            rect.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(FILE_TREE_WIDTH, 0);
            
            // Use window-shadow sprite for rounded corners like IC10 panels
            var bg = panel.AddComponent<Image>();
            var shadowSprite = LoadSlicedSprite("window-shadow.png", 12);
            if (shadowSprite != null)
            {
                bg.sprite = shadowSprite;
                bg.type = Image.Type.Sliced;
            }
            bg.color = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 0.5f); // White at 50% like IC10's window-shadow
            bg.raycastTarget = true;
            
            // Inner dark fill
            var innerGO = new GameObject("InnerFill");
            innerGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            var innerRect = innerGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            innerRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            innerRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            innerRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(2, 2);
            innerRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-2, -2);
            var innerBg = innerGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            innerBg.color = new Color(0, 0, 0, 0.7f); // Dark inner fill
            innerBg.raycastTarget = false;
            
            // Scroll view
            _fileTreeScrollRect = panel.AddComponent<ScrollRect>();
            _fileTreeScrollRect.horizontal = false;
            _fileTreeScrollRect.vertical = true;
            _fileTreeScrollRect.movementType = ScrollRect.MovementType.Clamped;
            _fileTreeScrollRect.scrollSensitivity = 25f;
            
            // Viewport
            var viewport = CreatePanel(panel.transform, "Viewport", 0, 0);
            var vpRect = viewport.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            vpRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            vpRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            vpRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(4, 4);
            vpRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-4, -4);
            
            viewport.AddComponent<Image>().color = Color.clear;
            viewport.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Mask>().showMaskGraphic = false;
            _fileTreeScrollRect.viewport = vpRect;
            
            // Content
            var content = CreatePanel(viewport.transform, "Content", 0, 0);
            _fileTreeContent = content.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            _fileTreeContent.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            _fileTreeContent.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            _fileTreeContent.pivot = new Vector2(0, 1);
            _fileTreeContent.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
            
            var vlg = content.AddComponent<VerticalLayoutGroup>();
            vlg.spacing = 1;
            vlg.padding = new RectOffset(3, 3, 3, 3);
            vlg.childControlWidth = true;
            vlg.childControlHeight = false;
            vlg.childForceExpandWidth = true;
            vlg.childForceExpandHeight = false;
            
            var csf = content.AddComponent<ContentSizeFitter>();
            csf.verticalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
            
            _fileTreeScrollRect.content = _fileTreeContent;
        }
```

- oldString:

```
        private void CreateFileTreePanel(Transform parent)
        {
            var panel = CreatePanel(parent, "FileTree", FILE_TREE_WIDTH, 0);
            var rect = panel.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 0);
            rect.anchorMax = new Vector2(0, 1);
            rect.pivot = new Vector2(0, 0.5f);
            rect.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(FILE_TREE_WIDTH, 0);
            
            var bg = panel.AddComponent<Image>();
            bg.color = new Color(0, 0, 0, 0.5f); // Semi-transparent dark overlay
            
            // Scroll view
            _fileTreeScrollRect = panel.AddComponent<ScrollRect>();
            _fileTreeScrollRect.horizontal = false;
            _fileTreeScrollRect.vertical = true;
            _fileTreeScrollRect.movementType = ScrollRect.MovementType.Clamped;
            _fileTreeScrollRect.scrollSensitivity = 25f;
            
            // Viewport
            var viewport = CreatePanel(panel.transform, "Viewport", 0, 0);
            var vpRect = viewport.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            vpRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            vpRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            vpRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(2, 2);
            vpRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-2, -2);
            
            viewport.AddComponent<Image>().color = Color.clear;
            viewport.AddComponent<UnityEngine.UI.Mask>().showMaskGraphic = false;
            _fileTreeScrollRect.viewport = vpRect;
            
            // Content
            var content = CreatePanel(viewport.transform, "Content", 0, 0);
            _fileTreeContent = content.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            _fileTreeContent.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            _fileTreeContent.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            _fileTreeContent.pivot = new Vector2(0, 1);
            _fileTreeContent.anchoredPosition = Vector2.zero;
            
            var vlg = content.AddComponent<VerticalLayoutGroup>();
            vlg.spacing = 1;
            vlg.padding = new RectOffset(3, 3, 3, 3);
            vlg.childControlWidth = true;
            vlg.childControlHeight = false;
            vlg.childForceExpandWidth = true;
            vlg.childForceExpandHeight = false;
            
            var csf = content.AddComponent<ContentSizeFitter>();
            csf.verticalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
            
            _fileTreeScrollRect.content = _fileTreeContent;
        }
```

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Creates the editor panel with IC10-style window-shadow sprite and proper TMP_InputField
        /// </summary>
        private void CreateEditorPanel(Transform parent)
        {
            // Editor container - positioned to the right of file tree
            var panel = CreatePanel(parent, "Editor", 0, 0);
            var rect = panel.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            rect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            rect.offsetMin = new Vector2(FILE_TREE_WIDTH + 5, 0);
            rect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Use window-shadow sprite for rounded corners like IC10's PanelInputCode
            var shadowImg = panel.AddComponent<Image>();
            var shadowSprite = LoadSlicedSprite("window-shadow.png", 12);
            if (shadowSprite != null)
            {
                shadowImg.sprite = shadowSprite;
                shadowImg.type = Image.Type.Sliced;
            }
            shadowImg.color = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 0.5f); // #FFFFFF80 like IC10's window-shadow
            shadowImg.raycastTarget = true;
            
            // Inner dark fill layer
            var innerFillGO = new GameObject("InnerFill");
            innerFillGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            var innerFillRect = innerFillGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            innerFillRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            innerFillRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            innerFillRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(2, 2);
            innerFillRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-2, -2);
            var innerFill = innerFillGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            innerFill.color = new Color(0, 0, 0, 0.75f); // #000000BF - dark overlay
            innerFill.raycastTarget = false;
            
            // Current file label (top right corner)
            var labelGO = new GameObject("FileLabel");
            labelGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            _currentFileLabel = labelGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            _currentFileLabel.text = \"No file selected\";
            _currentFileLabel.fontSize = 11;
            _currentFileLabel.color = TEXT_DIM;
            _currentFileLabel.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopRight;
            _currentFileLabel.raycastTarget = false;
            
            var labelRect = labelGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            labelRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            labelRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            labelRect.pivot = new Vector2(1, 1);
            labelRect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-8, -4);
            labelRect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 16);
            
            // === TMP_InputField setup - matches IC10's EditorLineOfCode structure ===
            // IC10 uses: LineOfCode -> InputField component with Text Area child containing InputText + Caret
            
            // Input field root - receives clicks and contains the field
            var inputGO = new GameObject(\"InputField\");
            inputGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            var inputRect = inputGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            inputRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            inputRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            inputRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(6, 6);
            inputRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-6, -22);
            
            // Background image - slightly visible for hover effect
            var inputBg = inputGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            inputBg.color = new Color(0.1f, 0.15f, 0.2f, 0.3f); // Slight blue tint for hover visibility
            inputBg.raycastTarget = true;
            
            // Text Area (viewport) - this clips the text content
            var textAreaGO = new GameObject(\"Text Area\");
            textAreaGO.transform.SetParent(inputGO.transform, false);
            var textAreaRect = textAreaGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            textAreaRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textAreaRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textAreaRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(6, 6);
            textAreaRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-6, -6);
            
            // RectMask2D clips text (and importantly, the caret)
            textAreaGO.AddComponent<RectMask2D>();
            
            // Placeholder text
            var placeholderGO = new GameObject(\"Placeholder\");
            placeholderGO.transform.SetParent(textAreaGO.transform, false);
            var placeholder = placeholderGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            placeholder.text = \"Click here to type your notes...\";
            placeholder.fontSize = 14;
            placeholder.color = TEXT_DIM;
            placeholder.fontStyle = FontStyles.Italic;
            placeholder.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopLeft;
            placeholder.raycastTarget = false;
            placeholder.enableWordWrapping = true;
            
            var phRect = placeholderGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            phRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            phRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            phRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            phRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Text component (where actual text appears)
            var textGO = new GameObject(\"Text\");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(textAreaGO.transform, false);
            var textComp = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            textComp.fontSize = 14;
            textComp.color = TEXT_NORMAL;
            textComp.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopLeft;
            textComp.enableWordWrapping = true;
            textComp.richText = false;
            textComp.overflowMode = TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
            textComp.raycastTarget = false;
            
            var textRect = textGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Create the TMP_InputField component
            _editorInputField = inputGO.AddComponent<TMP_InputField>();
            _editorInputField.textComponent = textComp;
            _editorInputField.placeholder = placeholder;
            _editorInputField.textViewport = textAreaRect;
            _editorInputField.lineType = TMP_InputField.LineType.MultiLineNewline;
            _editorInputField.richText = false;
            _editorInputField.characterLimit = 0;
            
            // IC10-style caret - orange, thick, blinking
            _editorInputField.caretColor = ACCENT;
            _editorInputField.customCaretColor = true;
            _editorInputField.caretWidth = 2;
            _editorInputField.caretBlinkRate = 0.85f;
            
            // Selection highlight - orange with transparency
            _editorInputField.selectionColor = SELECTED;
            
            // Events
            _editorInputField.onValueChanged.AddListener((_) => _hasUnsavedChanges = true);
            
            // Force activate input field when clicked for cursor to show
            _editorInputField.onSelect.AddListener((s) => {
                _editorInputField.ActivateInputField();
                // Force a refresh of the caret
                _editorInputField.ForceLabelUpdate();
            });
            
            // Add hover effect to show focus state
            var hoverHandler = inputGO.AddComponent<EditorHoverHandler>();
            hoverHandler.Background = inputBg;
            hoverHandler.NormalColor = new Color(0.1f, 0.15f, 0.2f, 0.3f);
            hoverHandler.HoverColor = new Color(0.15f, 0.22f, 0.3f, 0.5f);
            
            Debug.Log(\"[Station Planner] Editor panel created with IC10-style TMP_InputField\");
        }", "oldString": "        /// <summary>\n        /// Creates the editor panel with IC10-style sprite layering and proper TMP_InputField\n        /// </summary>\n        private void             _currentFileLabel.fontSize = 11;
            _currentFileLabel.color = TEXT_DIM;
            _currentFileLabel.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopRight;
            _currentFileLabel.raycastTarget = false;
            
            var labelRect = labelGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();

            labelRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            labelRect.pivot = new Vector2(1, 1);
            labelRect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-8, -4);
            labelRect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 16);
            
            // === TMP_InputField setup - matches IC10's EditorLineOfCode structure ===
            // IC10 uses: LineOfCode -> InputField component with Text Area child

            var inputGO = new GameObject("InputField");
            inputGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            var inputRect = inputGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            inputRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            inputRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            inputRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(6, 6);
            inputRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-6, -22);
            
            // Background image - slightly visible for hover effect

            inputBg.color = new Color(0.1f, 0.15f, 0.2f, 0.3f); // Slight blue tint
            inputBg.raycastTarget = true;
            
            // Text Area (viewport) - this clips the text content
            var textAreaGO = new GameObject("Text Area");
            textAreaGO.transform.SetParent(inputGO.transform, false);
            var textAreaRect = textAreaGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            textAreaRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textAreaRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textAreaRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(6, 6);
            textAreaRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-6, -6);
            
            // RectMask2D clips text (and importantly, the caret)
            textAreaGO.AddComponent<RectMask2D>();
            
            // Placeholder text
            var placeholderGO = new GameObject("Placeholder");
            placeholderGO.transform.SetParent(textAreaGO.transform, false);
            var placeholder = placeholderGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            placeholder.text = "Click here to type your notes...";
            placeholder.fontSize = 14;
            placeholder.color = TEXT_DIM;
            placeholder.fontStyle = FontStyles.Italic;
            placeholder.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopLeft;
            placeholder.raycastTarget = false;
            placeholder.enableWordWrapping = true;
            
            var phRect = placeholderGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            phRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            phRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            phRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            phRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Text component (where actual text appears)
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(textAreaGO.transform, false);
            var textComp = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            textComp.fontSize = 14;
            textComp.color = TEXT_NORMAL;
            textComp.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopLeft;
            textComp.enableWordWrapping = true;
            textComp.richText = false;
            textComp.overflowMode = TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
            textComp.raycastTarget = false;
            
            var textRect = textGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Create the TMP_InputField component
            _editorInputField = inputGO.AddComponent<TMP_InputField>();
            _editorInputField.textComponent = textComp;
            _editorInputField.placeholder = placeholder;
            _editorInputField.textViewport = textAreaRect;
            _editorInputField.lineType = TMP_InputField.LineType.MultiLineNewline;
            _editorInputField.richText = false;
            _editorInputField.characterLimit = 0;
            
            // IC10-style caret - orange, thick, blinking
            _editorInputField.caretColor = ACCENT;
            _editorInputField.customCaretColor = true;
            _editorInputField.caretWidth = 2;
            _editorInputField.caretBlinkRate = 0.85f;
            
            // Selection highlight - orange with transparency
            _editorInputField.selectionColor = SELECTED;
            
            // Events
            _editorInputField.onValueChanged.AddListener((_) => _hasUnsavedChanges = true);
            
            // Force activate input field when clicked for cursor to show
            _editorInputField.onSelect.AddListener((s) => {
                _editorInputField.ActivateInputField();
                // Force a refresh of the caret
                _editorInputField.ForceLabelUpdate();
            });
            
            // Add hover effect to show focus state
            var hoverHandler = inputGO.AddComponent<EditorHoverHandler>();
            hoverHandler.Background = inputBg;
            hoverHandler.NormalColor = new Color(0.1f, 0.15f, 0.2f, 0.3f);
            hoverHandler.HoverColor = new Color(0.15f, 0.22f, 0.3f, 0.5f);
            
            Debug.Log("[Station Planner] Editor panel created with IC10-style TMP_InputField");
        }

- oldString:

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Creates the editor panel with IC10-style sprite layering and proper TMP_InputField
        /// </summary>
        private void CreateEditorPanel(Transform parent)
        {
            // Editor container - positioned to the right of file tree
            var panel = CreatePanel(parent, "Editor", 0, 0);
            var rect = panel.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            rect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            rect.offsetMin = new Vector2(FILE_TREE_WIDTH + 5, 0);
            rect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // IC10 style layering for editor panel (PanelInputCode style)
            // Layer 1: Inner shadow/background - black with 75% opacity
            var innerBgGO = new GameObject("InnerBg");
            innerBgGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            var innerBgRect = innerBgGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            innerBgRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            innerBgRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            innerBgRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            innerBgRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            var innerBg = innerBgGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            innerBg.color = new Color(0, 0, 0, 0.75f); // #000000BF
            innerBg.raycastTarget = false; // Don't block input
            
            // Current file label
            var labelGO = new GameObject("FileLabel");
            labelGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            _currentFileLabel = labelGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            _currentFileLabel.text = "No file selected";
            _currentFileLabel.fontSize = 11;
            _currentFileLabel.color = TEXT_DIM;
            _currentFileLabel.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopRight;
            _currentFileLabel.raycastTarget = false;
            
            var labelRect = labelGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            labelRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            labelRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            labelRect.pivot = new Vector2(1, 1);
            labelRect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-5, -2);
            labelRect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 16);
            
            // === TMP_InputField setup (following Unity's required structure) ===
            // The hierarchy must be: InputField -> TextArea (viewport) -> Text + Placeholder
            
            // Input field root container
            var inputGO = new GameObject("InputField");
            inputGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            var inputRect = inputGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            inputRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            inputRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            inputRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(8, 8);
            inputRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-8, -20);
            
            // Raycast background for input field - CRITICAL for receiving clicks
            var inputBg = inputGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            inputBg.color = new Color(0, 0, 0, 0.01f); // Nearly invisible but catches raycasts
            inputBg.raycastTarget = true;
            
            // Text Area (this is the viewport for TMP_InputField)
            var textAreaGO = new GameObject("Text Area");
            textAreaGO.transform.SetParent(inputGO.transform, false);
            var textAreaRect = textAreaGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            textAreaRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textAreaRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textAreaRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(4, 4);
            textAreaRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-4, -4);
            
            // RectMask2D on the text area to clip text
            textAreaGO.AddComponent<RectMask2D>();
            
            // Placeholder - child of Text Area
            var placeholderGO = new GameObject("Placeholder");
            placeholderGO.transform.SetParent(textAreaGO.transform, false);
            var placeholder = placeholderGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            placeholder.text = "Type your notes here...";
            placeholder.fontSize = 14;
            placeholder.color = TEXT_DIM;
            placeholder.fontStyle = FontStyles.Italic;
            placeholder.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopLeft;
            placeholder.raycastTarget = false;
            placeholder.enableWordWrapping = true;
            
            var phRect = placeholderGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            phRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            phRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            phRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            phRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Text component - child of Text Area
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(textAreaGO.transform, false);
            var textComp = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            textComp.fontSize = 14;
            textComp.color = TEXT_NORMAL;
            textComp.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopLeft;
            textComp.enableWordWrapping = true;
            textComp.richText = false; // Plain text for editing
            textComp.overflowMode = TextOverflowModes.Overflow;
            textComp.raycastTarget = false;
            
            var textRect = textGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Create TMP_InputField component on the root
            _editorInputField = inputGO.AddComponent<TMP_InputField>();
            _editorInputField.textComponent = textComp;
            _editorInputField.placeholder = placeholder;
            _editorInputField.textViewport = textAreaRect;
            _editorInputField.lineType = TMP_InputField.LineType.MultiLineNewline;
            _editorInputField.richText = false;
            _editorInputField.characterLimit = 0;
            
            // IC10 style caret (orange, blinking)
            _editorInputField.caretColor = ACCENT;
            _editorInputField.customCaretColor = true;
            _editorInputField.selectionColor = SELECTED;
            _editorInputField.caretWidth = 2;
            _editorInputField.caretBlinkRate = 0.85f;
            
            // Hook up events
            _editorInputField.onValueChanged.AddListener((_) => _hasUnsavedChanges = true);
            
            // Force activate on select to ensure caret shows
            _editorInputField.onSelect.AddListener((s) => {
                _editorInputField.ActivateInputField();
            });
            
            Debug.Log("[Station Planner] Editor panel created with TMP_InputField");
        }
```


</details></tool-use>

This is a comprehensive set of issues to fix. Let me break them down:

1. **Button colors** - Need to match IC10's darker blue buttons
2. **Button dynamic sizing** - Buttons should scale with window and nest into rows when too small
3. **Cursor not showing** - Need to investigate how IC10 renders the cursor (they use a separate Caret object)
4. **Window shadow sprites** - Use window-shadow sprite for the file tree and editor panels with rounded corners
5. **File tree functionality** - Broken, need to fix and look at how IC10's Library works
6. **Divider styling** - Use rounded corner sprite with orange color
7. **Title padding and spacing** - Add padding, increase letter spacing (tracking/character spacing), make title bigger
8. **Cursor implementation** - Look at IC10's Caret rendering

Looking at the UI inspector screenshots:
- IC10 buttons use `button-bg` sprite with color `#FFFFFF10` (white at 10% opacity)
- IC10 has a `Caret` object under `~LineOfCode_1/Text Area/Caret`
- IC10 uses `window-shadow` sprite with color `#FFFFFF80` (white at 50% opacity)
- IC10 uses `dialog-bg` with `TranslucentImage` for the background
- The line items have `TMP_InputField` and `EditorLineOfCode` components

Key insights from the inspector:
1. The IC10 editor uses individual line objects (`~LineOfCode_1`) each with its own `TMP_InputField`
2. Each line has a `Text Area` child with `Caret` and `InputText` children
3. The Caret is a separate LayoutElement

For the cursor issue - TMP_InputField creates its own caret internally. The issue might be:
- The input field isn't being activated properly
- The caret color might be transparent


- The hierarchy might be incorrect

I'll systematically investigate the structural nuances of IC10's implementation. Diving deep into their code will reveal the precise configuration for line objects, cursor rendering, and component interactions. This methodical approach will help diagnose and resolve the underlying UI inconsistencies.

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

Looking at your screenshots, I can see what's happening. The UI Asset Inspector IS showing all the elements correctly. Let me explain:

**Screenshot 1 (over input area) - 7 elements:**
- InputText, Caret, ~LineOfCode_6, Outline, Image (dialog-bg), Image (window-shadow), PanelInputCode

**Screenshot 2 (over background) - 4 elements:**
- Outline, Image (dialog-bg), Image (window-shadow), PanelInputCode

The key insight is that **there is NO additional dark sprite** - the visual darkness comes from:

1. **PanelInputCode** (the root) has `Color: #000000BF` - that's **black at 75% opacity**
2. **window-shadow** at `#FFFFFF80` sits on top (white 50%)
3. **dialog-bg** at `#002A47FF` with **TranslucentImage: spriteBlending=1.00**

The **TranslucentImage** component is doing the magic - it's a blur/blend shader effect that makes the dialog-bg appear darker and more saturated than a regular Image would. Since we can't use TranslucentImage at runtime (requires special shader material), our panels will look different.

The layer stack from bottom to top is:
1. `PanelInputCode` - Black 75% base
2. `window-shadow` - White 50% (creates the soft glow/shadow effect)  
3. `dialog-bg` with TranslucentImage - Dark blue with blur blending
4. `dialog-outline` - Orange border

So for our Station Planner, since we can't use TranslucentImage, we should mimic this by using a darker base color on our panels. Want me to adjust the panel colors to better approximate the IC10 look without the TranslucentImage effect?

- newString:

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Creates the editor panel with IC10-style layered backgrounds:
        /// 1. Outer blue dialog-bg
        /// 2. Inner dark PanelInputCode overlay (dialog-bg at black 75%)
        /// </summary>
        private void CreateEditorPanel(Transform parent)
        {
            // Editor container - positioned to the right of file tree
            var panel = CreatePanel(parent, "Editor", 0, 0);
            var rect = panel.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            rect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            rect.offsetMin = new Vector2(FILE_TREE_WIDTH + 5, 0);
            rect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Layer 1: Blue dialog-bg background (outer frame)
            var bgImg = panel.AddComponent<Image>();
            var bgSprite = LoadSlicedSprite("dialog-bg.png", 12);
            if (bgSprite != null)
            {
                bgImg.sprite = bgSprite;
                bgImg.type = Image.Type.Sliced;
            }
            bgImg.color = new Color(0f, 0.165f, 0.278f, 0.95f); // #002A47 dark blue like IC10
            bgImg.raycastTarget = true;
            
            // Current file label (top right corner, above the dark input area)
            var labelGO = new GameObject("FileLabel");
            labelGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            _currentFileLabel = labelGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            _currentFileLabel.text = "No file selected";
            _currentFileLabel.fontSize = 11;
            _currentFileLabel.color = TEXT_DIM;
            _currentFileLabel.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopRight;
            _currentFileLabel.raycastTarget = false;
            
            var labelRect = labelGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            labelRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            labelRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            labelRect.pivot = new Vector2(1, 1);
            labelRect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-8, -4);
            labelRect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 16);
            
            // === Layer 2: Dark input area overlay - like IC10's PanelInputCode ===
            // IC10 uses dialog-bg sprite colored BLACK at 75% opacity (#000000BF)
            // This creates the dark rounded-corner input area
            
            var inputAreaGO = new GameObject("PanelInputCode");
            inputAreaGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            var inputAreaRect = inputAreaGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            inputAreaRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            inputAreaRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            inputAreaRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(6, 6);
            inputAreaRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-6, -22);
            
            // Use dialog-bg sprite but colored black at 75% - this is the IC10 magic!
            var inputAreaBg = inputAreaGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            var inputAreaSprite = LoadSlicedSprite("dialog-bg.png", 12);
            if (inputAreaSprite != null)
            {
                inputAreaBg.sprite = inputAreaSprite;
                inputAreaBg.type = Image.Type.Sliced;
            }
            inputAreaBg.color = new Color(0f, 0f, 0f, 0.75f); // #000000BF - black at 75% like IC10's PanelInputCode
            inputAreaBg.raycastTarget = true;
            
            // Input field root - receives clicks and contains the field (child of dark area)
            var inputGO = new GameObject("InputField");
            inputGO.transform.SetParent(inputAreaGO.transform, false);
            var inputRect = inputGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            inputRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            inputRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            inputRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(4, 4);
            inputRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-4, -4);
            
            // Background image - very subtle hover highlight
            var inputBg = inputGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            inputBg.color = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 0.01f); // Nearly invisible, just for hover
            inputBg.raycastTarget = true;
```

- oldString:

```
        /// <summary>
        /// Creates the editor panel with IC10-style window-shadow sprite and proper TMP_InputField
        /// </summary>
        private void CreateEditorPanel(Transform parent)
        {
            // Editor container - positioned to the right of file tree
            var panel = CreatePanel(parent, "Editor", 0, 0);
            var rect = panel.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            rect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            rect.offsetMin = new Vector2(FILE_TREE_WIDTH + 5, 0);
            rect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            
            // Use dialog-bg sprite for rounded corners like IC10's PanelInputCode
            var bgImg = panel.AddComponent<Image>();
            var bgSprite = LoadSlicedSprite("dialog-bg.png", 12);
            if (bgSprite != null)
            {
                bgImg.sprite = bgSprite;
                bgImg.type = Image.Type.Sliced;
            }
            bgImg.color = new Color(0f, 0.165f, 0.278f, 0.95f); // #002A47 dark blue like IC10
            bgImg.raycastTarget = true;
            
            // Current file label (top right corner)
            var labelGO = new GameObject("FileLabel");
            labelGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            _currentFileLabel = labelGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            _currentFileLabel.text = "No file selected";
            _currentFileLabel.fontSize = 11;
            _currentFileLabel.color = TEXT_DIM;
            _currentFileLabel.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.TopRight;
            _currentFileLabel.raycastTarget = false;
            
            var labelRect = labelGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            labelRect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            labelRect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            labelRect.pivot = new Vector2(1, 1);
            labelRect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(-8, -4);
            labelRect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, 16);
            
            // === TMP_InputField setup - matches IC10's EditorLineOfCode structure ===
            // IC10 uses: LineOfCode -> InputField component with Text Area child
            
            // Input field root - receives clicks and contains the field
            var inputGO = new GameObject("InputField");
            inputGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            var inputRect = inputGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            inputRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            inputRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            inputRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(6, 6);
            inputRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-6, -22);
            
            // Background image - very subtle, will change on hover
            var inputBg = inputGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            inputBg.color = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 0.02f); // Very subtle white
            inputBg.raycastTarget = true;
```


</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (copilot/claude-opus-4.5)**_

The user is pointing out that in the IC10 editor, there's a dark translucent rounded-corner panel (PanelInputCode) that sits on top of the blue dialog-bg. This panel has:
- Color #000000BF (black at 75% opacity)
- No sprite showing in the inspector
- But clearly has rounded corners

The key insight is that PanelInputCode shows "Image: (no sprite)" but has rounded corners. This is impossible with a regular Unity Image - without a sprite, it would just be a rectangle.

Wait - looking more carefully at the hierarchy from the screenshot:
- [7] PanelInputCode - Image (no sprite), Color #000000BF, Type: Sliced
- [6] Image - window-shadow sprite
- [5] Image - dialog-bg with TranslucentImage
- [4] Outline - dialog-outline

So PanelInputCode IS using Image type "Sliced" even though it says "(no sprite)". That's strange.

Actually, let me re-read: the inspector shows for PanelInputCode:
- Image: (no sprite)
- Color: #000000BF
- Type: Sliced, RaycastTarget: True

Hmm, "Type: Sliced" but no sprite? That doesn't make sense for rendering rounded corners...

Unless... the Image component exists but has a null sprite, and the rounded visual is coming from somewhere else entirely - like a Mask component on a parent that's clipping the content to a rounded shape?

Or maybe Unity's Image component CAN render with a color only when type is Sliced, and the parent's mask is providing the rounded corners?

Let me think about this differently. Looking at the code:
- InputSourceCode.cs has `public TranslucentImage Background;` - this is the main window background
- There's also `BackGroundFadeImage` which is a regular Image

The PanelInputCode panel is showing as having an Image with no sprite. 

I'm seeing a complex nested hierarchy that might explain the rounded corners. The panel's structure suggests multiple layers working together to create the visual effect. The null sprite on the main Image component could be intentionally designed to leverage parent components or nested Images for rendering the rounded shape. This might involve a combination of Sliced image type, potential masking, and strategic layering to achieve the desired visual result.

The diagnostic details hint at a nuanced rendering approach where the absence of a direct sprite doesn't necessarily mean no visual treatment exists. Unity's rendering system could be pulling styling information from alternative sources like materials or inherited component properties.

The core goal remains understanding how to replicate the Station Planner's input area styling, which seems to rely on sophisticated component interactions rather than a straightforward sprite assignment.

By leveraging the dialog-bg sprite with a strategic color overlay, we can create a dark, translucent layer with precise rounded corners. The key is using the 9-slice sprite to define shape while applying a semi-transparent black tint to achieve the desired visual effect.

The implementation strategy involves carefully layering UI components: establishing a base dialog background, then introducing a darker, translucent overlay specifically for the input region, ensuring visual consistency with the IC10 editor's design language.

Investigating the sprite configuration reveals critical insights about how the visual treatment can be replicated, with border dimensions and sprite type playing crucial roles in maintaining the intended aesthetic.

        private void CreateToolbar(Transform parent)
        {
            _toolbarContainer = CreatePanel(parent, "Toolbar", 0, TOOLBAR_HEIGHT);
            var rect = _toolbarContainer.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            rect.anchorMax = new Vector2(1, 1);
            rect.pivot = new Vector2(0.5f, 1);
            rect.anchoredPosition = new Vector2(0, -TITLE_BAR_HEIGHT);
            rect.sizeDelta = new Vector2(0, TOOLBAR_HEIGHT);
            
            // No background - buttons shade themselves, inherits from main dialog-bg
            
            // Use HorizontalLayoutGroup for button layout
            var hlg = _toolbarContainer.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
            hlg.spacing = 5;
            hlg.padding = new RectOffset(8, 8, 4, 4);
            hlg.childAlignment = TextAnchor.MiddleLeft;
            hlg.childControlWidth = false;
            hlg.childControlHeight = true;
            hlg.childForceExpandWidth = false;
            hlg.childForceExpandHeight = false;
            
            _toolbarButtons.Clear();
            _fileButtons.Clear();
            _formatButtons.Clear();
            
            // === FILE BUTTONS GROUP ===
            _fileButtonsContainer = new GameObject("FileButtons");
            _fileButtonsContainer.transform.SetParent(_toolbarContainer.transform, false);
            var fileHlg = _fileButtonsContainer.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
            fileHlg.spacing = 5;
            fileHlg.childControlWidth = false;
            fileHlg.childControlHeight = true;
            fileHlg.childForceExpandWidth = false;
            var fileLE = _fileButtonsContainer.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            fileLE.flexibleWidth = 0;
            
            var newFileBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_fileButtonsContainer.transform, "New", 45);
            newFileBtn.onClick.AddListener(OnNewFile);
            _fileButtons.Add(newFileBtn.gameObject);
            
            var newFolderBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_fileButtonsContainer.transform, "Folder", 55);
            newFolderBtn.onClick.AddListener(OnNewFolder);
            _fileButtons.Add(newFolderBtn.gameObject);
            
            var renameBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_fileButtonsContainer.transform, "Rename", 60);
            renameBtn.onClick.AddListener(OnRename);
            _fileButtons.Add(renameBtn.gameObject);
            
            var deleteBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_fileButtonsContainer.transform, "Delete", 55);
            deleteBtn.onClick.AddListener(OnDelete);
            _fileButtons.Add(deleteBtn.gameObject);
            
            var saveBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_fileButtonsContainer.transform, "Save", 45);
            saveBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => { SaveCurrentFile(); SaveFileSystem(); });
            _fileButtons.Add(saveBtn.gameObject);
            
            // === FILE DROPDOWN (hidden by default) ===
            _fileDropdownBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_toolbarContainer.transform, "File ▼", 55);
            _fileDropdownBtn.onClick.AddListener(ToggleFileDropdown);
            _fileDropdownBtn.gameObject.SetActive(false);
            
            // Separator
            _separatorGO = new GameObject("Sep");
            _separatorGO.transform.SetParent(_toolbarContainer.transform, false);
            var sepLE = _separatorGO.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            sepLE.preferredWidth = 2;
            sepLE.preferredHeight = 20;
            var sepImg = _separatorGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            var sepSprite = LoadSlicedSprite("scrollbar-handle.png", 4);
            if (sepSprite != null) { sepImg.sprite = sepSprite; sepImg.type = Image.Type.Sliced; }
            sepImg.color = new Color(1f, 1f, 1f, 0.4f);
            sepImg.raycastTarget = false;
            
            // === FORMAT BUTTONS GROUP ===
            _formatButtonsContainer = new GameObject("FormatButtons");
            _formatButtonsContainer.transform.SetParent(_toolbarContainer.transform, false);
            var formatHlg = _formatButtonsContainer.AddComponent<HorizontalLayoutGroup>();
            formatHlg.spacing = 5;
            formatHlg.childControlWidth = false;
            formatHlg.childControlHeight = true;
            formatHlg.childForceExpandWidth = false;
            var formatLE = _formatButtonsContainer.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            formatLE.flexibleWidth = 0;
            
            var boldBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_formatButtonsContainer.transform, "B", 28);
            boldBtn.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>().fontStyle = FontStyles.Bold;
            boldBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => InsertTag("<b>", "</b>"));
            _formatButtons.Add(boldBtn.gameObject);
            
            var italicBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_formatButtonsContainer.transform, "I", 28);
            italicBtn.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>().fontStyle = FontStyles.Italic;
            italicBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => InsertTag("<i>", "</i>"));
            _formatButtons.Add(italicBtn.gameObject);
            
            var headerBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_formatButtonsContainer.transform, "H", 28);
            headerBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => InsertTag("<size=120%><b>", "</b></size>"));
            _formatButtons.Add(headerBtn.gameObject);
            
            var colorBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_formatButtonsContainer.transform, "C", 28);
            colorBtn.GetComponentInChildren<TextMeshProUGUI>().color = ACCENT;
            colorBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => InsertTag("<color=#FBB03B>", "</color>"));
            _formatButtons.Add(colorBtn.gameObject);
            
            var bulletBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_formatButtonsContainer.transform, "-", 28);
            bulletBtn.onClick.AddListener(() => InsertText("\n- "));
            _formatButtons.Add(bulletBtn.gameObject);
            
            // === FORMAT DROPDOWN (hidden by default) ===
            _formatDropdownBtn = CreateToolbarBtn(_toolbarContainer.transform, "Format ▼", 70);
            _formatDropdownBtn.onClick.AddListener(ToggleFormatDropdown);
            _formatDropdownBtn.gameObject.SetActive(false);
            
            // Create dropdown menus (hidden)
            CreateDropdownMenus();
        }
        
        private void CreateDropdownMenus()
        {
            // File dropdown menu
            _fileDropdownMenu = CreateDropdownPanel(_windowPanel.transform, "FileDropdown");
            CreateDropdownItem(_fileDropdownMenu.transform, "New", OnNewFile);
            CreateDropdownItem(_fileDropdownMenu.transform, "Folder", OnNewFolder);
            CreateDropdownItem(_fileDropdownMenu.transform, "Rename", OnRename);
            CreateDropdownItem(_fileDropdownMenu.transform, "Delete", OnDelete);
            CreateDropdownItem(_fileDropdownMenu.transform, "Save", () => { SaveCurrentFile(); SaveFileSystem(); });
            _fileDropdownMenu.SetActive(false);
            
            // Format dropdown menu
            _formatDropdownMenu = CreateDropdownPanel(_windowPanel.transform, "FormatDropdown");
            CreateDropdownItem(_formatDropdownMenu.transform, "Bold", () => InsertTag("<b>", "</b>"));
            CreateDropdownItem(_formatDropdownMenu.transform, "Italic", () => InsertTag("<i>", "</i>"));
            CreateDropdownItem(_formatDropdownMenu.transform, "Header", () => InsertTag("<size=120%><b>", "</b></size>"));
            CreateDropdownItem(_formatDropdownMenu.transform, "Color", () => InsertTag("<color=#FBB03B>", "</color>"));
            CreateDropdownItem(_formatDropdownMenu.transform, "Bullet", () => InsertText("\n- "));
            _formatDropdownMenu.SetActive(false);
        }
        
        private GameObject CreateDropdownPanel(Transform parent, string name)
        {
            var panel = new GameObject(name);
            panel.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
            var rect = panel.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            rect.pivot = new Vector2(0, 1);
            rect.anchorMin = new Vector2(0, 1);
            rect.anchorMax = new Vector2(0, 1);
            
            // Background with dialog-bg sprite
            var bg = panel.AddComponent<Image>();
            var bgSprite = LoadSlicedSprite("dialog-bg.png", 12);
            if (bgSprite != null) { bg.sprite = bgSprite; bg.type = Image.Type.Sliced; }
            bg.color = new Color(0f, 0f, 0f, 0.9f);
            
            // Outline
            var outlineGO = new GameObject("Outline");
            outlineGO.transform.SetParent(panel.transform, false);
            var outlineRect = outlineGO.AddComponent<RectTransform>();
            outlineRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            outlineRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            outlineRect.offsetMin = Vector2.zero;
            outlineRect.offsetMax = Vector2.zero;
            var outlineImg = outlineGO.AddComponent<Image>();
            var outlineSprite = LoadSlicedSprite("dialog-outline.png", 12);
            if (outlineSprite != null) { outlineImg.sprite = outlineSprite; outlineImg.type = Image.Type.Sliced; }
            outlineImg.color = new Color(0.996f, 0.353f, 0.086f, 1f);
            outlineImg.raycastTarget = false;
            
            var vlg = panel.AddComponent<VerticalLayoutGroup>();
            vlg.spacing = 2;
            vlg.padding = new RectOffset(6, 6, 6, 6);
            vlg.childControlWidth = true;
            vlg.childControlHeight = false;
            vlg.childForceExpandWidth = true;
            
            var csf = panel.AddComponent<ContentSizeFitter>();
            csf.horizontalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
            csf.verticalFit = ContentSizeFitter.FitMode.PreferredSize;
            
            return panel;
        }
        
        private void CreateDropdownItem(Transform parent, string label, Action onClick)
        {
            var item = new GameObject(label);
            item.transform.SetParent(parent, false);
            
            var le = item.AddComponent<LayoutElement>();
            le.preferredWidth = 80;
            le.preferredHeight = 24;
            
            var bg = item.AddComponent<Image>();
            bg.color = BTN_NORMAL;
            
            var btn = item.AddComponent<Button>();
            btn.targetGraphic = bg;
            var colors = btn.colors;
            colors.normalColor = BTN_NORMAL;
            colors.highlightedColor = BTN_HOVER;
            colors.pressedColor = BTN_PRESS;
            btn.colors = colors;
            btn.onClick.AddListener(() => { onClick?.Invoke(); HideAllDropdowns(); });
            
            var textGO = new GameObject("Text");
            textGO.transform.SetParent(item.transform, false);
            var text = textGO.AddComponent<TextMeshProUGUI>();
            text.text = label;
            text.fontSize = 12;
            text.color = TEXT_NORMAL;
            text.alignment = TextAlignmentOptions.MidlineLeft;
            var textRect = textGO.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            textRect.anchorMin = Vector2.zero;
            textRect.anchorMax = Vector2.one;
            textRect.offsetMin = new Vector2(8, 0);
            textRect.offsetMax = new Vector2(-4, 0);
        }
        
        private void ToggleFileDropdown()
        {
            bool show = !_fileDropdownMenu.activeSelf;
            HideAllDropdowns();
            if (show)
            {
                _fileDropdownMenu.SetActive(true);
                PositionDropdown(_fileDropdownMenu, _fileDropdownBtn.gameObject);
            }
        }
        
        private void ToggleFormatDropdown()
        {
            bool show = !_formatDropdownMenu.activeSelf;
            HideAllDropdowns();
            if (show)
            {
                _formatDropdownMenu.SetActive(true);
                PositionDropdown(_formatDropdownMenu, _formatDropdownBtn.gameObject);
            }
        }
        
        private void PositionDropdown(GameObject dropdown, GameObject anchor)
        {
            var dropRect = dropdown.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            var anchorRect = anchor.GetComponent<RectTransform>();
            
            // Position below the anchor button
            Vector3[] corners = new Vector3[4];
            anchorRect.GetWorldCorners(corners);
            dropRect.position = new Vector3(corners[0].x, corners[0].y, 0);
        }
        
        private void HideAllDropdowns()
        {
            if (_fileDropdownMenu != null) _fileDropdownMenu.SetActive(false);
            if (_formatDropdownMenu != null) _formatDropdownMenu.SetActive(false);
        }
        
        private void UpdateToolbarLayout()
        {
            if (_windowRect == null) return;
            
            float windowWidth = _windowRect.sizeDelta.x;
            bool shouldCollapse = windowWidth < COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD;
            
            if (shouldCollapse != _isCollapsed)
            {
                _isCollapsed = shouldCollapse;
                
                // Toggle between expanded and collapsed modes
                _fileButtonsContainer.SetActive(!shouldCollapse);
                _formatButtonsContainer.SetActive(!shouldCollapse);
                _separatorGO.SetActive(!shouldCollapse);
                
                _fileDropdownBtn.gameObject.SetActive(shouldCollapse);
                _formatDropdownBtn.gameObject.SetActive(shouldCollapse);
                
                HideAllDropdowns();
            }
        }
```
